<!doctype html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Previsão de Vendas - Universo Tintas</title>
    <link
      rel="icon"
      type="image/png"
      sizes="32x32"
      href="https://www.universotintas.com.br/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/cropped-apple-touch-icon-32x32.png"
    />
    <link
      rel="apple-touch-icon"
      sizes="180x180"
      href="https://www.universotintas.com.br/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/cropped-apple-touch-icon-180x180.png"
    />
    <link
      href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap"
      rel="stylesheet"
    />
    <link
      href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/icon?family=Material+Icons"
      rel="stylesheet"
    />
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
    <script>
      // Polyfill storage for sandboxed iframes (n8n webhook HTML)
      (function () {
        function createMemoryStorage() {
          var store = {};
          return {
            getItem: function (k) {
              return store.hasOwnProperty(k) ? store[k] : null;
            },
            setItem: function (k, v) {
              store[k] = String(v);
            },
            removeItem: function (k) {
              delete store[k];
            },
            clear: function () {
              for (var p in store) delete store[p];
            },
            get length() {
              return Object.keys(store).length;
            },
            key: function (i) {
              return Object.keys(store)[i] || null;
            },
          };
        }
        try {
          window.sessionStorage;
        } catch (e) {
          Object.defineProperty(window, "sessionStorage", {
            value: createMemoryStorage(),
            writable: false,
          });
        }
        try {
          window.localStorage;
        } catch (e) {
          Object.defineProperty(window, "localStorage", {
            value: createMemoryStorage(),
            writable: false,
          });
        }
        // Polyfill navigator.locks — always override to avoid SecurityError
        // in sandboxed iframe contexts where the API exists but is blocked
        var noopRequest = function (_name, _opts, cb) {
          if (typeof _opts === "function") {
            cb = _opts;
          }
          return Promise.resolve(cb({ name: _name, mode: "exclusive" }));
        };
        try {
          Object.defineProperty(navigator, "locks", {
            value: {
              request: noopRequest,
              query: function () {
                return Promise.resolve({ held: [], pending: [] });
              },
            },
            writable: true,
            configurable: true,
          });
        } catch (e) {
          // If defineProperty fails, try direct assignment
          try {
            navigator.locks = {
              request: noopRequest,
              query: function () {
                return Promise.resolve({ held: [], pending: [] });
              },
            };
          } catch (e2) {}
        }
      })();
    </script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/xlsx@0.18.5/dist/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked/marked.min.js"></script>
    <style>
      :root {
        --color-primary: #f78005;
        --color-primary-hover: #944a00;
        --color-wine: #a63934;
        --color-dark-gray: #011a3b;
        --color-medium-gray: #58595b;
        --color-white: #ffffff;
        --color-black: #1a1a1a;
        --color-success: #4caf50;

        --bg-body: #f9f9ff;
        --bg-sidebar: var(--color-dark-gray);
        --bg-main: #f0f3ff;
        --bg-card: var(--color-white);
        --bg-header: var(--color-dark-gray);

        --text-primary: #021b3c;
        --text-secondary: #574335;
        --text-inverse: var(--color-white);

        --border-color: rgba(138, 114, 99, 0.15);
        --sidebar-width: 260px;
        --shadow-ambient: 0px 12px 32px rgba(2, 27, 60, 0.08);

        --surface-container-low: #f0f3ff;
        --surface-container-high: #dfe8ff;

        --on-error-container: #93000a;
      }

      [data-theme="dark"] {
        --bg-body: #0a0f1a;
        --bg-sidebar: #050a14;
        --bg-main: #0f1520;
        --bg-card: #1b2235;
        --bg-header: #070c18;

        --text-primary: #e0e5f0;
        --text-secondary: #a0a8c0;
        --text-inverse: #e0e0e0;

        --border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
        --surface-container-low: #0f1520;
        --surface-container-high: #1b2235;
        --shadow-ambient: 0px 12px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
      }

      * {
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        box-sizing: border-box;
      }

      body {
        font-family: "Inter", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
        height: 100vh;
        overflow: hidden;
        background: var(--bg-body);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        transition:
          background-color 0.3s ease,
          color 0.3s ease;
      }

      .app-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        height: 100vh;
      }

      /* HEADER */
      .app-header {
        background: var(--bg-header);
        color: var(--text-inverse);
        padding: 16px 30px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        z-index: 100;
        position: relative;
      }
      /* Brand accent — sutil faixa com a paleta do anel Universo Tintas */
      .app-header::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        height: 2px;
        background: linear-gradient(
          90deg,
          #00a3e0 0%,
          #6cbf3f 20%,
          #ffd400 40%,
          #f78005 60%,
          #e6007e 80%,
          #6f3fa0 100%
        );
        opacity: 0.85;
      }

      .header-left {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 16px;
      }

      .toggle-sidebar-btn {
        background: transparent;
        border: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--color-primary);
        width: 38px;
        height: 38px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .toggle-sidebar-btn:hover {
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
      }

      .logo-area {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 14px;
      }

      .app-logo {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        height: 36px;
      }
      .app-logo img {
        height: 100%;
        width: auto;
        display: block;
      }
      .header-divider {
        width: 1px;
        height: 26px;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
      }

      .header-subtitle {
        font-size: 0.85rem;
        font-weight: 500;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65);
      }

      .header-right {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
      }

      .header-badge {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        font-size: 11px;
        padding: 5px 10px;
        border-radius: 20px;
        font-weight: 600;
        border: 1px solid rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.3);
        color: #4caf50;
        background: rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.1);
      }
      .header-badge .dot {
        width: 6px;
        height: 6px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #4caf50;
        box-shadow: 0 0 5px #4caf50;
        animation: pulse 2s infinite;
      }

      @keyframes pulse {
        0% {
          opacity: 1;
        }
        50% {
          opacity: 0.5;
        }
        100% {
          opacity: 1;
        }
      }

      /* MAIN GRID */
      .main-grid {
        display: grid;
        flex: 1;
        overflow: hidden;
        transition: grid-template-columns 0.3s ease;
      }
      @media (min-width: 769px) {
        .main-grid {
          grid-template-columns: var(--sidebar-width) 1fr;
        }
        .main-grid.sidebar-closed {
          grid-template-columns: 0 1fr;
        }
      }

      .sidebar-backdrop {
        display: none;
      }

      /* SIDEBAR */
      #sidebar {
        background: var(--bg-sidebar);
        border-right: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        overflow: hidden;
        transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
      }

      .sidebar-nav {
        flex: 1;
        padding: 20px 12px;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 4px;
      }

      .nav-section-title {
        font-size: 10px;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 1.5px;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35);
        padding: 16px 12px 8px;
      }

      .nav-item {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 12px 14px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 500;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        border: none;
        background: transparent;
        width: 100%;
        text-align: left;
        position: relative;
      }
      .nav-item:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        color: white;
      }
      .nav-item.active {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        color: white;
      }
      .nav-item.active::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        top: 50%;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        width: 4px;
        height: 60%;
        background: var(--color-primary);
        border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
      }
      .nav-item i {
        width: 18px;
        height: 18px;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .nav-item.predict {
        border: 1px solid var(--color-primary);
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #944a00, #f78005);
        color: white;
        transition: all 0.5s ease;
      }
      .nav-item.predict:hover {
        opacity: 0.9;
      }

      /* SIDEBAR FOOTER */
      .sidebar-footer {
        padding: 16px;
        border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
        margin-top: auto;
      }
      .user-profile {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 8px;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        border-radius: 8px;
      }
      .user-avatar {
        width: 36px;
        height: 36px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 14px;
      }
      .user-info {
        flex: 1;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      .user-name {
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-inverse);
        white-space: nowrap;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
      }
      .user-role {
        font-size: 11px;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
      }
      .footer-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 8px;
        margin-top: 12px;
      }
      .footer-btn {
        flex: 1;
        padding: 8px;
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
        background: transparent;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
        border-radius: 6px;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 6px;
        font-size: 12px;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .footer-btn:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        color: white;
      }

      /* MAIN CONTENT */
      .main-content {
        overflow-y: auto;
        padding: 32px;
        background: var(--bg-main);
        transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
      }
      .page-header {
        margin-bottom: 32px;
      }
      .page-header h1 {
        font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
        font-size: 1.75rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-bottom: 6px;
      }
      .page-header p {
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }

      .info-bar {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 24px;
        margin-bottom: 24px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }
      .info-chip {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        background: var(--bg-card);
        padding: 8px 14px;
        border-radius: 20px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-ambient);
      }
      .info-chip .info-link {
        color: var(--color-primary);
        text-decoration: none;
        font-weight: 500;
        background: none;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;
        font: inherit;
        cursor: pointer;
      }
      .info-chip .info-link:hover:not(:disabled) {
        text-decoration: underline;
      }
      .info-chip .info-link:disabled {
        opacity: 0.5;
        cursor: not-allowed;
      }
      .info-chip .material-icons {
        font-size: 18px;
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }

      /* TABLE CARD */
      .table-card {
        background: var(--bg-card);
        border-radius: 12px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-ambient);
        overflow: hidden;
        transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
      }
      .table-toolbar {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        padding: 16px 24px;
        gap: 16px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }
      .table-toolbar-left {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
        flex: 1;
        min-width: 200px;
      }
      .search-box {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 8px 14px;
        flex: 1;
        max-width: 360px;
        transition: border-color 0.2s;
      }
      .search-box:focus-within {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .search-box input {
        border: none;
        background: transparent;
        outline: none;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        width: 100%;
        font-family: inherit;
      }
      .search-box input::placeholder {
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }
      .search-box .material-icons {
        font-size: 20px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }

      .table-toolbar-right {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
      }
      .toolbar-btn {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        padding: 8px 14px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 500;
        cursor: pointer;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .toolbar-btn:hover {
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
      }
      .toolbar-btn .material-icons {
        font-size: 18px;
      }

      /* TABLE */
      .data-table {
        width: 100%;
        border-collapse: collapse;
      }
      .data-table thead {
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
      }
      .data-table th {
        padding: 14px 20px;
        text-align: left;
        font-size: 0.75rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .data-table th.numeric {
        text-align: right;
      }
      .data-table td {
        padding: 14px 20px;
        font-size: 0.875rem;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        vertical-align: middle;
      }
      .data-table td.numeric {
        text-align: right;
        font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 600;
        font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
      }
      .data-table tbody tr {
        transition: background-color 0.15s;
      }
      .data-table tbody tr:hover {
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
      }

      .sku-code {
        font-family: "Manrope", monospace;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--color-primary);
        font-size: 0.85rem;
      }
      .product-desc {
        font-size: 0.85rem;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        max-width: 320px;
        white-space: nowrap;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
        display: block;
      }

      /* PAGINATION */
      .table-footer {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        padding: 14px 24px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 12px;
      }
      .table-footer-info {
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }
      .pagination {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 4px;
      }
      .page-btn {
        width: 34px;
        height: 34px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: transparent;
        border-radius: 8px;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 500;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        transition: all 0.15s;
      }
      .page-btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .page-btn.active {
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .page-btn:disabled {
        opacity: 0.35;
        cursor: not-allowed;
      }
      .page-btn .material-icons {
        font-size: 18px;
      }
      .rows-per-page {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }
      .rows-per-page select {
        padding: 4px 8px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 6px;
        background: var(--bg-card);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        font-size: 13px;
        outline: none;
        cursor: pointer;
      }

      /* LOGIN */
      .login-overlay {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        background: rgba(1, 26, 59, 0.9);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        z-index: 9999;
        backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      }
      .login-box {
        background: var(--bg-card);
        padding: 40px;
        border-radius: 16px;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 400px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-ambient);
        text-align: center;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      .login-box::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        height: 4px;
        background: linear-gradient(
          90deg,
          #00a3e0 0%,
          #6cbf3f 20%,
          #ffd400 40%,
          #f78005 60%,
          #e6007e 80%,
          #6f3fa0 100%
        );
      }
      .login-brand {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 12px;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
      }
      .login-brand img {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
        display: block;
      }
      .login-logo {
        font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 800;
        font-size: 1.5rem;
        letter-spacing: -0.5px;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        line-height: 1;
      }
      .login-logo span {
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .login-subtitle {
        font-size: 14px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: 28px;
      }
      .login-input {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 12px 16px;
        margin-bottom: 14px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 14px;
        outline: none;
        transition: border-color 0.2s;
        font-family: inherit;
      }
      .login-input:focus {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        border-width: 2px;
      }
      .login-btn {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 12px;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #944a00, #f78005);
        color: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 15px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        margin-top: 4px;
      }
      .login-btn:hover {
        opacity: 0.9;
        transform: translateY(-1px);
      }
      .err-msg {
        color: var(--color-wine);
        font-size: 13px;
        margin-top: 12px;
        display: none;
      }

      .table-loading {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        padding: 60px 20px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        font-size: 14px;
        gap: 10px;
      }
      .spinner {
        width: 20px;
        height: 20px;
        border: 3px solid var(--border-color);
        border-top-color: var(--color-primary);
        border-radius: 50%;
        animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
      }
      @keyframes spin {
        to {
          transform: rotate(360deg);
        }
      }
      @keyframes fadeIn {
        from {
          opacity: 0;
          transform: translateY(8px);
        }
        to {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translateY(0);
        }
      }

      .table-error {
        display: none;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        padding: 60px 20px;
        text-align: center;
      }

      /* RESPONSIVE */
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .app-header {
          padding: 12px 16px;
        }
        .header-subtitle {
          display: none;
        }
        .main-grid {
          grid-template-columns: 1fr;
          position: relative;
        }
        .main-grid.sidebar-closed {
          grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        #sidebar {
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
          top: 0;
          width: 260px;
          height: 100%;
          z-index: 200;
          box-shadow: 2px 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
          transition: transform 0.3s ease;
          transform: translateX(-100%);
        }
        .main-grid:not(.sidebar-closed) #sidebar {
          transform: translateX(0);
        }
        .sidebar-backdrop {
          display: none;
          position: absolute;
          top: 0;
          left: 0;
          right: 0;
          bottom: 0;
          background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
          z-index: 199;
          pointer-events: none;
        }
        .main-grid:not(.sidebar-closed) .sidebar-backdrop {
          display: block;
          pointer-events: auto;
        }
        .main-content {
          padding: 20px 16px;
        }
        .table-toolbar {
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: stretch;
        }
        .data-table th,
        .data-table td {
          padding: 10px 12px;
        }
        .product-desc {
          max-width: 160px;
        }
      }
      @media (max-width: 480px) {
        .page-header h1 {
          font-size: 1.3rem;
        }
        .info-bar {
          gap: 8px;
        }
        .info-chip {
          font-size: 12px;
          padding: 6px 10px;
        }
      }

      /* BACKTEST RESPONSIVE */
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .backtest-controls-header {
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: stretch;
          gap: 10px;
        }
        .backtest-actions {
          justify-content: stretch;
        }
        .backtest-actions .add-btn {
          flex: 1;
        }
        #testesSection .add-btn {
          justify-content: center;
        }
        .month-picker-grid {
          grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(95px, 1fr));
          max-height: 220px;
          padding: 10px;
          gap: 6px;
        }
        .month-chip {
          font-size: 12px;
          padding: 7px 8px;
        }
        .month-picker-toolbar {
          gap: 6px;
        }
        .month-picker-count {
          width: 100%;
          margin-left: 0;
          order: 99;
        }
        .chip-btn {
          padding: 5px 10px;
          font-size: 11px;
        }
        .backtest-summary {
          gap: 10px;
        }
        .backtest-summary .summary-card {
          min-width: 0;
          flex: 1 1 100%;
          padding: 12px 14px;
        }
        .backtest-summary .summary-card .val {
          font-size: 1.2rem;
        }
        .backtest-loading {
          padding: 14px 16px;
        }
        .backtest-loading-head {
          gap: 10px;
        }
        .backtest-results-header {
          flex-direction: column;
          align-items: flex-start;
        }
        #backtestResultsCard {
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        #backtestResultsCard .table-toolbar {
          padding: 12px 14px;
        }
        #backtestResultsCard .data-table th,
        #backtestResultsCard .data-table td {
          padding: 10px 12px;
          font-size: 12px;
        }
        #backtestResultsCard .product-desc {
          max-width: 180px;
        }
        .backtest-help {
          font-size: 12px;
          padding: 12px 14px;
        }
        .backtest-legend {
          gap: 10px;
        }
        .backtest-errors {
          font-size: 12px;
          padding: 10px 14px;
        }
      }
      @media (max-width: 480px) {
        #testesSection .table-card {
          padding: 14px !important;
        }
        .month-picker-grid {
          grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(82px, 1fr));
          max-height: 200px;
        }
        .month-chip {
          font-size: 11px;
          padding: 6px 6px;
        }
        .backtest-progress-meta {
          font-size: 10px;
        }
        .backtest-loading-head .ttl {
          font-size: 13px;
        }
        #backtestResultsCard .product-desc {
          max-width: 140px;
        }
      }

      /* USERS SECTION */
      .users-section {
        display: none;
      }
      .users-section.active {
        display: block;
        animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease;
      }
      /* CHAT (Assistente IA) */
      #chatSection.active {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        height: calc(100vh - 140px);
        min-height: 480px;
      }
      .chat-wrapper {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        flex: 1;
        min-height: 0;
        background: var(--bg-card);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 16px;
        overflow: hidden;
        --asst-accent: #f78005;
        --asst-success: #2e9e5b;
        --asst-success-bg: rgba(46, 158, 91, 0.1);
        --asst-warn: #c77800;
        --asst-warn-bg: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.12);
        --asst-info: #2563c9;
        --asst-info-bg: rgba(37, 99, 201, 0.1);
        --asst-cta: #944a00;
        --asst-cta-bg: rgba(148, 74, 0, 0.1);
      }
      [data-theme="dark"] .chat-wrapper {
        --asst-success: #4cd585;
        --asst-success-bg: rgba(76, 213, 133, 0.14);
        --asst-warn: #f7a23f;
        --asst-warn-bg: rgba(247, 162, 63, 0.16);
        --asst-info: #6ea8ff;
        --asst-info-bg: rgba(110, 168, 255, 0.14);
        --asst-cta: #f78005;
        --asst-cta-bg: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.14);
      }
      /* Histórico de conversas */
      .chat-history {
        width: 250px;
        flex-shrink: 0;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        min-height: 0;
        border-right: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--bg-card);
      }
      .chat-history-head {
        padding: 14px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .chat-new-btn {
        width: 100%;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 8px;
        padding: 10px 14px;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #944a00, #f78005);
        color: #fff;
        font-weight: 600;
        font-size: 13px;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: opacity 0.2s;
      }
      .chat-new-btn:hover {
        opacity: 0.92;
      }
      .chat-new-btn i {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
      }
      .chat-history-list {
        flex: 1;
        min-height: 0;
        overflow-y: auto;
        padding: 8px;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 3px;
      }
      .chat-history-list::-webkit-scrollbar {
        width: 8px;
      }
      .chat-history-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
        background: var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 8px;
      }
      .chat-history-item {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 9px;
        width: 100%;
        text-align: left;
        padding: 9px 10px;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 9px;
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 13px;
        font-family: inherit;
        transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
      }
      .chat-history-item:hover {
        background: var(--surface-container-high);
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .chat-history-item.active {
        background: var(--asst-cta-bg);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .chat-history-item > i {
        width: 15px;
        height: 15px;
        flex-shrink: 0;
        color: var(--asst-accent);
      }
      .chat-history-title {
        flex: 1;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }
      .chat-history-del {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        opacity: 0;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        transition: opacity 0.15s, color 0.15s;
      }
      .chat-history-item:hover .chat-history-del {
        opacity: 0.65;
      }
      .chat-history-del:hover {
        opacity: 1 !important;
        color: #d9534f;
      }
      .chat-history-del i {
        width: 14px;
        height: 14px;
      }
      .chat-history-empty {
        padding: 18px 12px;
        font-size: 12.5px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        text-align: center;
        line-height: 1.5;
      }
      .chat-main {
        flex: 1;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        min-width: 0;
        min-height: 0;
      }
      .chat-history-toggle {
        display: none;
        flex-shrink: 0;
        width: 36px;
        height: 36px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 9px;
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        cursor: pointer;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
      }
      .chat-history-toggle i {
        width: 18px;
        height: 18px;
      }
      .chat-header {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 16px 20px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .chat-header h1 {
        font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
        font-size: 1.25rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .chat-history {
          position: absolute;
          z-index: 20;
          height: 100%;
          box-shadow: var(--shadow-ambient);
          transform: translateX(-100%);
          transition: transform 0.25s ease;
        }
        .chat-history.open {
          transform: translateX(0);
        }
        .chat-history-toggle {
          display: inline-flex;
        }
      }
      .chat-area {
        position: relative;
        flex: 1;
        min-height: 0;
        overflow-y: auto;
        padding: 22px 20px;
      }
      .chat-area::-webkit-scrollbar {
        width: 8px;
      }
      .chat-area::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
        background: var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 8px;
      }
      .chat-messages-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 18px;
        max-width: 860px;
        margin: 0 auto;
      }
      .chat-empty {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        margin: auto;
        height: max-content;
        text-align: center;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
        padding: 24px;
      }
      .chat-empty-icon {
        width: 64px;
        height: 64px;
        border-radius: 18px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #944a00, #f78005);
        color: #fff;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.3);
      }
      .chat-empty-icon i {
        width: 30px;
        height: 30px;
      }
      .chat-empty-title {
        font-weight: 800;
        font-size: 1.2rem;
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .chat-empty-subtitle {
        font-size: 13.5px;
        max-width: 420px;
        line-height: 1.5;
      }
      .chat-suggestions {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 10px;
        justify-content: center;
        max-width: 560px;
        margin-top: 8px;
      }
      .chat-suggestion {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        background: var(--surface-container-high);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        border-radius: 22px;
        padding: 9px 16px;
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 500;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .chat-suggestion i {
        width: 15px;
        height: 15px;
        color: #f78005;
      }
      .chat-suggestion:hover {
        border-color: #f78005;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        transform: translateY(-1px);
        box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.15);
      }
      /* Message rows */
      .message {
        display: flex;
        gap: 12px;
        max-width: 82%;
        animation: chatFadeIn 0.3s ease;
      }
      @keyframes chatFadeIn {
        from {
          opacity: 0;
          transform: translateY(8px);
        }
        to {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translateY(0);
        }
      }
      .message.user {
        align-self: flex-end;
        flex-direction: row-reverse;
        margin-left: auto;
      }
      .message-avatar {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        width: 38px;
        height: 38px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        color: #fff;
      }
      .message-avatar i {
        width: 18px;
        height: 18px;
      }
      .message.assistant .message-avatar,
      .message-avatar.assistant {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #944a00, #f78005);
      }
      .message.user .message-avatar {
        background: var(--color-dark-gray, #011a3b);
      }
      .message-content {
        background: var(--surface-container-high);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 14px;
        padding: 13px 17px;
        font-size: 14px;
        line-height: 1.7;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        word-break: break-word;
        overflow-wrap: anywhere;
      }
      .message.user .message-content {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #944a00, #f78005);
        color: #fff;
        border-color: transparent;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
      }
      .message-content > *:first-child {
        margin-top: 0;
      }
      .message-content > *:last-child {
        margin-bottom: 0;
      }
      .message-content p {
        margin: 0 0 10px;
      }
      .message-content ul,
      .message-content ol {
        margin: 8px 0;
        padding-left: 20px;
      }
      .message-content li {
        margin: 3px 0;
      }
      .message-content code {
        background: rgba(148, 74, 0, 0.1);
        padding: 1px 6px;
        border-radius: 5px;
        font-size: 12.5px;
        font-family: "SFMono-Regular", Consolas, monospace;
      }
      .message-content pre {
        background: rgba(2, 27, 60, 0.06);
        padding: 12px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        overflow-x: auto;
        margin: 8px 0;
      }
      [data-theme="dark"] .message-content code {
        background: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.18);
      }
      [data-theme="dark"] .message-content pre {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
      }
      .message-content pre code {
        background: none;
        padding: 0;
      }
      .message-content blockquote {
        margin: 8px 0;
        padding: 4px 14px;
        border-left: 3px solid var(--asst-accent);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }
      .message-content hr {
        border: none;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        margin: 14px 0;
      }
      .message-content a {
        color: var(--asst-accent);
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .message-content table {
        border-collapse: collapse;
        margin: 10px 0;
        font-size: 13px;
        width: 100%;
      }
      .message-content th,
      .message-content td {
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        padding: 6px 10px;
        text-align: left;
      }
      .message-content th {
        background: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.08);
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      .message-content h3 {
        font-size: 14.5px;
        font-weight: 700;
        margin: 12px 0 6px;
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      /* Colored section cards (h2 by emoji) */
      .message-content h2 {
        font-size: 14px;
        font-weight: 700;
        margin: 14px 0 8px;
        padding: 8px 12px;
        border-radius: 9px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        background: var(--surface-container-high);
        border-left: 4px solid var(--text-secondary);
      }
      .message-content h2:first-child {
        margin-top: 0;
      }
      .message-content h2.sec-spec {
        background: var(--asst-success-bg);
        border-left-color: var(--asst-success);
        color: var(--asst-success);
      }
      .message-content h2.sec-warn {
        background: var(--asst-warn-bg);
        border-left-color: var(--asst-warn);
        color: var(--asst-warn);
      }
      .message-content h2.sec-info {
        background: var(--asst-info-bg);
        border-left-color: var(--asst-info);
        color: var(--asst-info);
      }
      .message-content h2.sec-cta {
        background: var(--asst-cta-bg);
        border-left-color: var(--asst-cta);
        color: var(--asst-cta);
      }
      /* Typing indicator */
      .chat-typing {
        display: flex;
        gap: 12px;
        align-items: center;
        max-width: 860px;
        margin: 0 auto 4px;
        padding: 0 2px;
      }
      .typing-dots {
        display: inline-flex;
        gap: 5px;
        align-items: center;
        background: var(--surface-container-high);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 14px;
        padding: 14px 16px;
      }
      .typing-dots span {
        width: 7px;
        height: 7px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: var(--asst-accent, #f78005);
        animation: typingBounce 1.3s infinite both;
      }
      .typing-dots span:nth-child(2) {
        animation-delay: 0.2s;
      }
      .typing-dots span:nth-child(3) {
        animation-delay: 0.4s;
      }
      @keyframes typingBounce {
        0%,
        80%,
        100% {
          transform: translateY(0);
          opacity: 0.4;
        }
        40% {
          transform: translateY(-5px);
          opacity: 1;
        }
      }
      .chat-input-area {
        border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        padding: 14px 16px;
      }
      .chat-input-bar {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
        align-items: flex-end;
        max-width: 860px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        background: var(--surface-container-high);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 16px;
        padding: 8px 8px 8px 16px;
        transition: border-color 0.2s;
      }
      .chat-input-bar:focus-within {
        border-color: #f78005;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.12);
      }
      .chat-input {
        flex: 1;
        resize: none;
        max-height: 140px;
        border: none;
        background: transparent;
        padding: 9px 0;
        font-size: 14px;
        font-family: inherit;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        line-height: 1.4;
      }
      .chat-input:focus {
        outline: none;
      }
      .chat-send-btn {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #944a00, #f78005);
        color: #fff;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition:
          opacity 0.2s,
          transform 0.15s;
      }
      .chat-send-btn i {
        width: 18px;
        height: 18px;
      }
      .chat-send-btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
        transform: scale(1.06);
      }
      .chat-send-btn:disabled {
        opacity: 0.45;
        cursor: not-allowed;
      }
      .users-header {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        margin-bottom: 24px;
      }
      .users-header h1 {
        font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
        font-size: 1.75rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .users-header .add-btn {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        padding: 10px 18px;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #944a00, #f78005);
        color: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .users-header .add-btn:hover {
        opacity: 0.9;
      }
      .users-count {
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-top: 4px;
      }
      .action-btn {
        background: transparent;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        width: 32px;
        height: 32px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .action-btn:hover {
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .action-btn.danger:hover {
        background: rgba(166, 57, 52, 0.1);
        color: var(--color-wine);
        border-color: var(--color-wine);
      }

      /* MODAL */
      .modal-overlay {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        display: none;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        z-index: 10000;
        backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
      }
      .modal-overlay.active {
        display: flex;
      }
      .modal-box {
        background: var(--bg-card);
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 28px;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 440px;
        box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
      }
      .modal-title {
        font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
        font-size: 1.2rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-bottom: 20px;
      }
      .modal-field {
        margin-bottom: 14px;
      }
      .modal-field label {
        display: block;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: 6px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      }
      .modal-field input {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 10px 14px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 14px;
        outline: none;
        font-family: inherit;
        transition: border-color 0.2s;
      }
      .modal-field input:focus {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .modal-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        margin-top: 20px;
      }
      .modal-btn {
        padding: 10px 20px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        border: none;
      }
      .modal-btn.cancel {
        background: transparent;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .modal-btn.cancel:hover {
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
      }
      .modal-btn.primary {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #944a00, #f78005);
        color: white;
      }
      .modal-btn.primary:hover {
        opacity: 0.9;
      }
      .modal-btn.danger {
        background: var(--color-wine);
        color: white;
      }
      .modal-btn.danger:hover {
        opacity: 0.9;
      }
      .modal-error {
        color: var(--color-wine);
        font-size: 13px;
        margin-top: 10px;
        display: none;
      }

      /* ROLE BADGES */
      .role-badge {
        display: inline-block;
        padding: 3px 10px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 600;
        text-transform: capitalize;
      }
      .role-badge.admin {
        background: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.12);
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .role-badge.visualizador {
        background: rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.12);
        color: #2e7d32;
      }

      /* ROLE SELECT */
      .modal-field select {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 10px 14px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 14px;
        outline: none;
        font-family: inherit;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: border-color 0.2s;
      }
      .modal-field select:focus {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }

      /* HISTORY ALERT */
      .history-alert {
        background: var(--bg-card);
        border-left: 4px solid var(--color-wine);
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 14px 18px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-ambient);
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        display: flex;
        gap: 12px;
        align-items: flex-start;
      }
      .history-alert.warn {
        border-left-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .history-alert.ok {
        border-left-color: var(--color-success);
      }
      .history-alert .alert-icon {
        font-size: 22px;
        color: var(--color-wine);
        flex-shrink: 0;
        margin-top: 1px;
      }
      .history-alert.warn .alert-icon {
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .history-alert.ok .alert-icon {
        color: var(--color-success);
      }
      .history-alert .alert-title {
        font-weight: 700;
        margin-bottom: 2px;
      }
      .history-alert .alert-body {
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        line-height: 1.45;
      }
      .history-alert .alert-body strong {
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .history-alert code {
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        padding: 1px 6px;
        border-radius: 4px;
        font-family: "Manrope", monospace;
        font-size: 12px;
      }

      /* DROP ZONE */
      .upload-card {
        margin-bottom: 20px;
      }
      .drop-zone {
        background: var(--bg-card);
        border: 2px dashed var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 28px 22px;
        text-align: center;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .drop-zone.dragover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        background: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.05);
      }
      .drop-zone .drop-icon {
        font-size: 38px;
        color: var(--color-primary);
        margin-bottom: 6px;
      }
      .drop-zone .drop-title {
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 14px;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-bottom: 4px;
      }
      .drop-zone .drop-sub {
        font-size: 12px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: 14px;
      }
      .drop-zone .drop-actions {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 14px;
      }
      .drop-status {
        font-size: 12px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }
      .drop-status.ok {
        color: var(--color-success);
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .drop-status.err {
        color: var(--color-wine);
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .drop-status.warn {
        color: #b58105;
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .drop-zone.uploading {
        opacity: 0.7;
        pointer-events: none;
        border-style: solid;
      }
      .drop-zone.uploading::after {
        content: "Enviando...";
        display: block;
        margin-top: 8px;
        font-size: 12px;
        color: var(--color-primary);
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      /* BACKTEST month picker */
      .backtest-controls-header {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 16px;
        margin-bottom: 12px;
      }
      .backtest-controls-label {
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        letter-spacing: 0.2px;
      }
      .backtest-actions {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        justify-content: flex-end;
      }
      .month-picker-toolbar {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }
      .month-picker-count {
        margin-left: auto;
        font-size: 12px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .chip-btn {
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 600;
        padding: 6px 12px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.15s;
      }
      .chip-btn:hover {
        background: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.08);
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .month-picker-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(110px, 1fr));
        gap: 8px;
        max-height: 280px;
        overflow-y: auto;
        padding: 12px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
      }
      .month-chip {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 6px;
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        background: var(--bg-card);
        border: 1.5px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 8px 10px;
        cursor: pointer;
        user-select: none;
        transition: all 0.15s;
      }
      .month-chip:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .month-chip input {
        accent-color: var(--color-primary);
        margin: 0;
      }
      .month-chip.selected {
        background: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.12);
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }

      /* MONTH HEADER STATES */
      .data-table th.numeric.col-current {
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .data-table th.numeric.col-current::after {
        content: " (atual)";
        font-weight: 500;
        opacity: 0.8;
      }
      .data-table td.numeric .tol {
        font-weight: 500;
        font-size: 0.7rem;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-left: 4px;
        font-variant-numeric: normal;
      }
      .data-table td.numeric .insufficient {
        font-style: italic;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        font-weight: 500;
      }

      /* FORMAT BADGES */
      .formato-badge {
        display: inline-block;
        padding: 2px 8px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        font-size: 10px;
        font-weight: 600;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.4px;
        margin-left: 8px;
      }
      .formato-badge.comprados {
        background: rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.12);
        color: #1976d2;
      }
      .formato-badge.sgb {
        background: rgba(166, 57, 52, 0.12);
        color: var(--color-wine);
      }
      .formato-badge.warn {
        background: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.15);
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }

      /* BACKTEST SUMMARY */
      .backtest-summary {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 12px;
      }
      .backtest-summary .summary-card {
        flex: 1;
        min-width: 180px;
        background: var(--bg-card);
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 14px 18px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-ambient);
      }
      .backtest-summary .summary-card .lbl {
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.6px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }
      .backtest-summary .summary-card .val {
        font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 800;
        font-size: 1.4rem;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-top: 4px;
      }
      .backtest-summary .summary-card .sub {
        font-size: 12px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-top: 2px;
      }
      .err-cell.good {
        color: var(--color-success);
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      .err-cell.warn {
        color: var(--color-primary);
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      .err-cell.bad {
        color: var(--color-wine);
        font-weight: 700;
      }

      /* Marcador discreto de ajuste v2 (substitui empilhamento de emojis). */
      .adj-dot {
        display: inline-block;
        width: 6px;
        height: 6px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        margin-left: 4px;
        vertical-align: middle;
        opacity: 0.85;
      }
      .adj-regime-down { background: var(--color-wine); }
      .adj-regime-up   { background: var(--color-primary); }
      .adj-fence       { background: var(--color-primary); }
      .adj-cap         { background: var(--text-secondary); }
      .adj-v1sel       { background: var(--text-secondary); opacity: 0.5; }
      .adj-bias-down   { background: var(--text-secondary); opacity: 0.6; }
      .adj-bias-up     { background: var(--text-secondary); opacity: 0.6; }

      /* BACKTEST PIVOT TABLE */
      .backtest-pivot-table th.month-group {
        text-align: center !important;
        border-left: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.06);
        color: var(--color-primary);
        font-weight: 800;
      }
      .backtest-pivot-table th.sub {
        font-size: 0.65rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        opacity: 0.85;
        padding-top: 6px;
        padding-bottom: 6px;
      }
      .backtest-pivot-table th.sub:nth-child(3n + 1) {
        border-left: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .backtest-pivot-table td.muted {
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        opacity: 0.6;
      }
      .backtest-table-scroll {
        overflow-x: auto;
        overflow-y: hidden;
        -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
        scrollbar-color: var(--color-primary) var(--surface-container-low);
      }
      .backtest-table-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar {
        height: 10px;
      }
      .backtest-table-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
      }
      .backtest-table-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
        background: var(--color-primary);
        border-radius: 999px;
      }
      .backtest-table-scroll .data-table {
        min-width: max-content;
      }
      .backtest-pivot-table th,
      .backtest-pivot-table td {
        white-space: nowrap;
      }
      .backtest-pivot-table .product-desc {
        max-width: 280px;
        display: inline-block;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
        vertical-align: middle;
      }
      .bt-toggle {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        cursor: pointer;
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 6px 12px;
        user-select: none;
      }
      .bt-toggle input {
        accent-color: var(--color-primary);
        margin: 0;
      }
      .bt-toggle:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .delta-chip {
        display: inline-block;
        font-size: 10px;
        font-weight: 700;
        padding: 1px 5px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        margin-left: 4px;
        vertical-align: middle;
      }
      .delta-chip.good {
        background: rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.15);
        color: var(--color-success);
      }
      .delta-chip.bad {
        background: rgba(166, 57, 52, 0.12);
        color: var(--color-wine);
      }

      /* Generic add-btn (also used outside .users-header) */
      .add-btn {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        padding: 10px 18px;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #944a00, #f78005);
        color: #fff;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.25);
      }
      .add-btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
        opacity: 0.92;
        transform: translateY(-1px);
        box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.32);
      }
      .add-btn:disabled {
        opacity: 0.65;
        cursor: not-allowed;
        box-shadow: none;
      }
      .add-btn.secondary {
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        box-shadow: none;
      }
      .add-btn.secondary:hover:not(:disabled) {
        border-color: var(--color-wine);
        color: var(--color-wine);
        box-shadow: none;
        transform: none;
      }
      .add-btn .btn-spinner {
        width: 14px;
        height: 14px;
        border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45);
        border-top-color: #fff;
        border-radius: 50%;
        animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
      }

      /* BACKTEST LOADING OVERLAY */
      .backtest-loading {
        margin-top: 16px;
        background: var(--bg-card);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 20px 22px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-ambient);
        animation: fadeIn 0.25s ease;
      }
      .backtest-loading-head {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
        margin-bottom: 12px;
      }
      .backtest-loading-head .spinner {
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .backtest-loading-head .ttl {
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        font-size: 14px;
      }
      .backtest-loading-head .sub {
        font-size: 12px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-top: 2px;
      }
      .backtest-progress-track {
        height: 8px;
        background: var(--surface-container-low);
        border-radius: 999px;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      .backtest-progress-bar {
        height: 100%;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg, #944a00, #f78005);
        border-radius: 999px;
        transition: width 0.3s ease;
        width: 0%;
      }
      .backtest-progress-meta {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        font-size: 11px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-top: 6px;
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      /* GLOBAL SUMMARY CARD (destacado) */
      .backtest-summary .summary-card.global {
        background: linear-gradient(
          135deg,
          rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.08),
          rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.02)
        );
        border: 1.5px solid rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.35);
      }
      .backtest-summary .summary-card .val.good {
        color: var(--color-success);
      }
      .backtest-summary .summary-card .val.warn {
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .backtest-summary .summary-card .val.bad {
        color: var(--color-wine);
      }

      /* HELP / LEGEND */
      .backtest-help {
        margin-top: 16px;
        background: var(--bg-card);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-left: 4px solid var(--color-primary);
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 14px 18px;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        line-height: 1.55;
      }
      .backtest-help strong {
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .backtest-legend {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 14px;
        margin-top: 8px;
      }
      .backtest-legend .lg-item {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .backtest-legend .lg-dot {
        width: 10px;
        height: 10px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        display: inline-block;
      }
      .lg-dot.good { background: var(--color-success); }
      .lg-dot.warn { background: var(--color-primary); }
      .lg-dot.bad  { background: var(--color-wine); }

      /* ERRORS PANEL */
      .backtest-errors {
        margin-top: 16px;
        background: rgba(166, 57, 52, 0.06);
        border: 1px solid rgba(166, 57, 52, 0.35);
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 12px 16px;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--color-wine);
      }
      .backtest-errors .err-title {
        font-weight: 700;
        margin-bottom: 6px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
      }
      .backtest-errors ul {
        margin: 0;
        padding-left: 20px;
      }

      /* Status text states */
      #backtestStatus.is-error {
        color: var(--color-wine);
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      #backtestStatus.is-success {
        color: var(--color-success);
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      /* Results header (count + clear) */
      .backtest-results-header {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 10px;
        margin-top: 20px;
        margin-bottom: -8px;
      }
      .backtest-results-header .meta {
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .backtest-results-header .meta strong {
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .backtest-results-header .meta .cached {
        margin-left: 8px;
        background: rgba(247, 128, 5, 0.12);
        color: var(--color-primary);
        padding: 2px 8px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        font-size: 11px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.4px;
      }
    </style>
  </head>

  <body>
    <div class="app-container">
      <header class="app-header">
        <div class="header-left">
          <button
            class="toggle-sidebar-btn"
            id="toggleSidebarBtn"
            title="Alternar menu"
          >
            <i data-lucide="panel-left"></i>
          </button>
          <div class="logo-area">
            <div class="app-logo">
              <img
                src="https://www.universotintas.com.br/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/logo-white-300x83.webp"
                alt="Universo Tintas"
              />
            </div>
            <div class="header-divider"></div>
            <div class="header-subtitle">Painel de Previsões</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="header-right"></div>
      </header>

      <div class="main-grid" id="mainGrid">
        <div class="sidebar-backdrop" id="sidebarBackdrop"></div>
        <aside id="sidebar">
          <nav class="sidebar-nav">
            <div class="nav-section-title">Menu</div>
            <button
              class="nav-item predict"
              id="predictBtn"
              data-page="predict"
            >
              <i data-lucide="sparkles"></i>
              <span>Realizar Previsão</span>
            </button>
            <button class="nav-item active" data-page="forecast">
              <i data-lucide="bar-chart-3"></i>
              <span>Previsão de Vendas</span>
            </button>
            <button class="nav-item" data-page="testes">
              <i data-lucide="flask-conical"></i>
              <span>Testes (Backtest)</span>
            </button>
            <button class="nav-item" data-page="chat">
              <i data-lucide="message-circle"></i>
              <span>Assistente IA</span>
            </button>
            <button class="nav-item" id="usersNavBtn" data-page="users">
              <i data-lucide="users"></i>
              <span>Usuários</span>
            </button>
            <button class="nav-item" id="historyUploadBtn" type="button">
              <i data-lucide="upload"></i>
              <span>Inserir Histórico</span>
            </button>
          </nav>
          <div class="sidebar-footer">
            <div class="user-profile">
              <div class="user-avatar" id="userAvatar">AD</div>
              <div class="user-info">
                <div class="user-name" id="userName">Administrador</div>
                <div class="user-role" id="userRole">—</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="footer-actions">
              <button
                class="footer-btn"
                id="themeToggleBtn"
                title="Alternar Tema"
              >
                <i data-lucide="moon" style="width: 14px; height: 14px"></i>
                <span>Tema</span>
              </button>
              <button class="footer-btn" id="logoutBtn" title="Sair do sistema">
                <i data-lucide="log-out" style="width: 14px; height: 14px"></i>
                <span>Sair</span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </aside>

        <main class="main-content">
          <div id="forecastSection">
            <div class="page-header">
              <h1>Previsão Detalhada por SKU</h1>
              <p>
                Mês atual + 2 próximos meses projetados pelo modelo
                determinístico (ensemble).
              </p>
            </div>
            <div class="info-bar">
              <div class="info-chip">
                <span class="material-icons">history</span>
                Previsto por último em: <span id="lastPredictedDate">—</span>
              </div>
              <div class="info-chip">
                <span class="material-icons">folder_open</span>
                <span id="totalSkuCount">0</span> SKUs
              </div>
              <div class="info-chip">
                <span class="material-icons">event</span>
                Último mês no histórico: <span id="lastHistoryMonth">—</span>
              </div>
              <div class="info-chip">
                <span class="material-icons">file_download</span>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  id="downloadExcelBtn"
                  class="info-link"
                  disabled
                  title="Baixar planilha (.xlsx) com a previsão atual"
                >Baixar Excel</button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- History status / missing months alert -->
            <div
              id="historyAlert"
              class="history-alert"
              style="display: none"
            ></div>

            <div class="table-card">
              <div class="table-toolbar">

                "=([^;]*)",

      function getMonthColumns(data) {
        if (!data || !data.length) return [];
        // Apenas chaves no formato YYYY-MM são colunas de mês.
        const monthRe = /^\d{4}-\d{2}$/;
        const cols = Object.keys(data[0]).filter((k) => monthRe.test(k));
        // Garante ordem cronológica e no máximo 3 colunas (mês atual + 2).
        cols.sort();
        return cols.slice(0, 3);
      }

      function formatMonth(key) {
        const [y, m] = key.split("-");
        const months = [
          "Jan",
          "Fev",
          "Mar",
          "Abr",
          "Mai",
          "Jun",
          "Jul",
          "Ago",
          "Set",
          "Out",
          "Nov",
          "Dez",
        ];
        return months[parseInt(m) - 1] + " " + y;
      }

      function formatValue(val) {
        if (val == null) return "\u2014";
        return val.toLocaleString("pt-BR", {
          minimumFractionDigits: 0,
          maximumFractionDigits: 0,
        });
      }

      function renderTable() {
        const cols = getMonthColumns(allData);
        if (!cols.length) return;

        const now = new Date();
        const currentKey =
          now.getFullYear() + "-" + String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");

        const headers = [
          document.getElementById("colMonth1"),
          document.getElementById("colMonth2"),
          document.getElementById("colMonth3"),
        ];
        headers.forEach((th, i) => {
          if (!th) return;
          th.textContent = cols[i] ? formatMonth(cols[i]) : "";
          th.classList.toggle("col-current", cols[i] === currentKey);
        });

        const perPage = parseInt(els.rowsPerPage.value);
        const totalPages = Math.ceil(filteredData.length / perPage);
        if (currentPage > totalPages) currentPage = totalPages || 1;

        const start = (currentPage - 1) * perPage;
        const pageData = filteredData.slice(start, start + perPage);

        els.tableBody.innerHTML = "";
        pageData.forEach((row) => {
          const tr = document.createElement("tr");
          let descBadge = "";
          const fmt = (row.Formato || "").toLowerCase();
          if (fmt === "comprados")
            descBadge =
              ' <span class="formato-badge comprados" title="Lead time alto — média móvel simples">Comprados</span>';
          else if (fmt === "sgb")
            descBadge =
              ' <span class="formato-badge sgb" title="Private Label — previsão externa históricamente imprecisa">SGB</span>';
          if (row.insufficientHistory)
            descBadge +=
              ' <span class="formato-badge warn" title="Histórico insuficiente: faltam ' +
              (row.monthsMissingForMin || 0) +
              ' mês(es) para a previsão">hist. insuf.</span>';

          tr.innerHTML =
            '<td><span class="sku-code">' + row.SKU + "</span></td>";
          tr.innerHTML +=
            '<td><span class="product-desc" title="' +
            row["Descrição"] +
            '">' +
            row["Descrição"] +
            "</span>" +
            descBadge +
            "</td>";
          cols.forEach((col) => {
            const val = row[col];
            const det = row.detalhes && row.detalhes[col];
            if (row.insufficientHistory) {
              tr.innerHTML +=
                '<td class="numeric"><span class="insufficient">sem dados</span></td>';
            } else {
              // Faixa mín–máx (intervalo de confiança) no lugar do valor pontual.
              const ic = det && det.intervaloConfianca;
              let lower = ic && ic.lower != null ? ic.lower : null;
              let upper = ic && ic.upper != null ? ic.upper : null;
              if (
                (lower == null || upper == null) &&
                det &&
                det.tolerancePct != null &&
                val != null
              ) {
                lower = Math.max(0, val * (1 - det.tolerancePct / 100));
                upper = val * (1 + det.tolerancePct / 100);
              }
              const cell =
                lower != null && upper != null
                  ? formatValue(lower) + " – " + formatValue(upper)
                  : val != null
                  ? formatValue(val)
                  : "—";
              tr.innerHTML += '<td class="numeric">' + cell + "</td>";
            }
          });
          els.tableBody.appendChild(tr);
        });

        const endIdx = Math.min(start + perPage, filteredData.length);
        els.footerInfo.textContent =
          "Mostrando " +
          (filteredData.length > 0 ? start + 1 : 0) +
          " a " +
          endIdx +
          " de " +
          filteredData.length +
          " SKUs";
        els.totalSkuCount.textContent = allData.length;
        renderPagination(totalPages);
        const dlBtn = document.getElementById("downloadExcelBtn");
        if (dlBtn) dlBtn.disabled = !allData.length;
      }

      function downloadForecastExcel() {
        if (!allData.length) return;
        if (typeof XLSX === "undefined") {
          alert("Biblioteca de exportação não carregou. Verifique sua conexão e recarregue a página.");
          return;
        }
        const cols = getMonthColumns(allData);
        const headerLabels = ["SKU", "Descrição", "Formato"];
        for (const c of cols) {
          const label = formatMonth(c);
          headerLabels.push(label + " (mín)", label + " (máx)");
        }
        const aoa = [headerLabels];
        for (const row of allData) {
          const line = [
            row.SKU || "",
            row["Descrição"] || "",
            row.Formato || "",
          ];
          for (const c of cols) {
            if (row.insufficientHistory) {
              line.push("sem dados", "sem dados");
              continue;
            }
            const v = row[c];
            const det = row.detalhes && row.detalhes[c];
            const ic = det && det.intervaloConfianca;
            let lower = ic && ic.lower != null ? ic.lower : null;
            let upper = ic && ic.upper != null ? ic.upper : null;
            if (
              (lower == null || upper == null) &&
              det &&
              det.tolerancePct != null &&
              v != null
            ) {
              lower = Math.max(0, v * (1 - det.tolerancePct / 100));
              upper = v * (1 + det.tolerancePct / 100);
            }
            line.push(
              lower == null ? "" : Math.round(Number(lower)),
              upper == null ? "" : Math.round(Number(upper))
            );
          }
          aoa.push(line);
        }
        const ws = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(aoa);
        ws["!cols"] = [
          { wch: 12 },
          { wch: 50 },
          { wch: 12 },
        ].concat(cols.flatMap(() => [{ wch: 12 }, { wch: 12 }]));
        const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
        XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, "Previsão");
        const d = new Date();
        const stamp =
          d.getFullYear() +
          "-" +
          String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0") +
          "-" +
          String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
        XLSX.writeFile(wb, "previsao-" + stamp + ".xlsx");
      }

      function renderPagination(totalPages) {
