        let sp = Math.max(1, currentPage - Math.floor(maxV / 2));
        let ep = Math.min(totalPages, sp + maxV - 1);
        if (ep - sp < maxV - 1) sp = Math.max(1, ep - maxV + 1);

        for (let i = sp; i <= ep; i++) {
          const b = document.createElement("button");
          b.className = "page-btn" + (i === currentPage ? " active" : "");
          b.textContent = i;
          b.addEventListener("click", () => {
            currentPage = i;

          els.pagination.appendChild(b);

        if (ep < totalPages) {
          const d = document.createElement("span");
          d.textContent = "...";
          d.style.padding = "0 6px";
          d.style.color = "var(--text-secondary)";
          els.pagination.appendChild(d);

        const next = document.createElement("button");
        next.className = "page-btn";
        next.innerHTML = '<span class="material-icons">chevron_right</span>';
        next.disabled = currentPage >= totalPages;

      // ============================================
      // API
      // ============================================
      async function fetchPredictions() {
        const response = await fetch(API_GET_PREDICTIONS);
        if (!response.ok)
          throw new Error("Erro ao buscar previsões: " + response.status);
        const text = await response.text();
        if (!text) return [];
        return JSON.parse(text);
      }

      // Tamanho do lote padrão (sobrepujado pela resposta de "start" do n8n).
      const PREDICT_DEFAULT_CHUNK = 30;
      // Pequeno respiro entre chunks para não saturar o task-runner.
      const PREDICT_INTER_CHUNK_DELAY_MS = 250;

      async function predictPhase(body, attempt) {
        const r = await fetch(API_POST_PREDICT, {
          method: "POST",
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          body: JSON.stringify(body || {}),
        });
        const text = await r.text();
        if (!r.ok) {
          // Retry transitório em 502/522/524 (timeouts da borda).
          if ((r.status === 524 || r.status === 522 || r.status === 502) && (attempt || 0) < 1) {
            await new Promise((res) => setTimeout(res, 4000));
            return predictPhase(body, (attempt || 0) + 1);
          }
          throw new Error(
            "HTTP " + r.status + (text ? " — " + text.slice(0, 200) : "")
          );
        }
        if (!text || !text.trim()) return null;
        try { return JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) { return text; }
      }

      // ---- Persistência de progresso da previsão (resumível após reload) ----
      // O servidor mantém `predict-source` e `predict-aggregate` no Redis
      // (TTL ~1h), então basta o front lembrar de onde parou para continuar
      // chamando `phase=chunk` sem refazer `phase=start` (que resetaria o
      // agregado).
      const PREDICT_PROGRESS_KEY = "ut_predict_progress_v1";
      function _pdSaveProgress(s) {
        try { localStorage.setItem(PREDICT_PROGRESS_KEY, JSON.stringify(s)); } catch (e) {}
      }
      function _pdLoadProgress() {
        try { const r = localStorage.getItem(PREDICT_PROGRESS_KEY); return r ? JSON.parse(r) : null; } catch (e) { return null; }
      }
      function _pdClearProgress() {
        try { localStorage.removeItem(PREDICT_PROGRESS_KEY); } catch (e) {}
      }
      let predictIsRunning = false;

      // Orquestra start → chunks → finalize.
      // onProgress: ({ phase, totalSkus, processedSkus, processedTotal, chunkSize }) => void
      // Se `resumeState` for fornecido, pula `start` e continua dos `offset/processedTotal`.
      async function requestNewPrediction(onProgress, resumeState) {
        predictIsRunning = true;
        try {
          let totalSkus, chunkSize, offset, processedTotal;
          if (resumeState && typeof resumeState.offset === "number") {
            totalSkus = resumeState.totalSkus || 0;
            chunkSize = resumeState.chunkSize || PREDICT_DEFAULT_CHUNK;
            offset = resumeState.offset;
            processedTotal = resumeState.processedTotal || 0;
            if (onProgress) onProgress({ phase: "chunk", totalSkus, chunkSize, processedTotal, processedSkus: 0 });
          } else {
            const startRes = await predictPhase({ phase: "start" });
            totalSkus = (startRes && startRes.totalSkus) || 0;
            chunkSize = (startRes && startRes.chunkSize) || PREDICT_DEFAULT_CHUNK;
            offset = 0;
            processedTotal = 0;
            if (onProgress) onProgress({ phase: "start", totalSkus, chunkSize, processedTotal: 0 });
          }
          _pdSaveProgress({ totalSkus, chunkSize, offset, processedTotal, startedAt: (resumeState && resumeState.startedAt) || Date.now() });

          // Salvaguarda contra loop infinito (no máximo 200 chunks → 6000 SKUs).
          for (let i = 0; i < 200; i++) {
            const chunkRes = await predictPhase({
              phase: "chunk",
              skuOffset: offset,
              skuLimit: chunkSize,
            });
            if (!chunkRes) throw new Error("Resposta vazia em phase=chunk.");
            processedTotal = chunkRes.aggregatedTotal != null
              ? chunkRes.aggregatedTotal
              : processedTotal + (chunkRes.processedSkus || 0);
            offset = chunkRes.nextOffset != null ? chunkRes.nextOffset : (offset + chunkSize);
            if (chunkRes.totalSkus) totalSkus = chunkRes.totalSkus;
            _pdSaveProgress({ totalSkus, chunkSize, offset, processedTotal, startedAt: Date.now() });
            if (onProgress) {
              onProgress({
                phase: "chunk",
                totalSkus,
                processedSkus: chunkRes.processedSkus || 0,
                processedTotal,
                chunkSize,
              });
            }
            if (!chunkRes.hasMore) break;
            if (PREDICT_INTER_CHUNK_DELAY_MS > 0) {
              await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, PREDICT_INTER_CHUNK_DELAY_MS));
            }
          }

          const finalRes = await predictPhase({ phase: "finalize" });
          _pdClearProgress();
          if (onProgress) onProgress({ phase: "finalize", totalSkus, processedTotal, chunkSize });
          return finalRes;
        } finally {
          predictIsRunning = false;
        }
      }

      function updateLastPredictedDate(isoString) {
        if (!isoString) {
          els.lastPredictedDate.textContent = "\u2014";
          return;
        }
        const date = new Date(isoString);
        els.lastPredictedDate.textContent = date.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR");
      }

      function renderHistoryAlert(validation) {
        const el = els.historyAlert;
        if (!el) return;
        if (!validation) {
          el.style.display = "none";
          return;
        }
        if (validation.lastHistoryMonth) {
          els.lastHistoryMonth.textContent = formatMonth(
            validation.lastHistoryMonth,
          );
        } else {
          els.lastHistoryMonth.textContent = "\u2014";
        }
        if (validation.missingPreviousMonth) {
          const list = (validation.missingMonths || [])
            .map((m) => "<code>" + formatMonth(m) + "</code>")
            .join(", ");
          el.className = "history-alert";
          el.innerHTML =
            '<span class="material-icons alert-icon">error</span>' +
            '<div><div class="alert-title">Histórico incompleto para o mês atual</div>' +
            '<div class="alert-body">A previsão do <strong>mês atual</strong> exige o mês anterior (<code>' +
            formatMonth(validation.expectedPreviousMonth) +
            "</code>) presente no histórico. " +
            (list ? "Faltam: " + list + ". " : "") +
            "Último mês presente: <strong>" +
            formatMonth(validation.lastHistoryMonth || "") +
            "</strong>. Atualize a planilha de histórico antes de continuar.</div></div>";
          el.style.display = "flex";
        } else {
          el.style.display = "none";
        }
      }

      async function loadAndRender(opts) {
        const skipLoading = opts && opts.skipLoading;
        if (!skipLoading) {
          els.tableLoading.style.display = "flex";
          els.dataTable.style.display = "none";
          els.tableError.style.display = "none";
          els.tableEmpty.style.display = "none";
        }
        try {
          const response = await fetchPredictions();
          const wrapper = Array.isArray(response) ? response[0] : response;
          const createdAt = wrapper && wrapper.createdAt;
          const validation = wrapper && wrapper.validation;
          allData = wrapper && Array.isArray(wrapper.data) ? wrapper.data : [];
          renderHistoryAlert(validation);
          if (!allData.length) {
            filteredData = [];
            els.tableLoading.style.display = "none";
            els.tableEmpty.style.display = "flex";
            els.lastPredictedDate.textContent = "\u2014";
            return false;
          }
          filteredData = [...allData];
          updateLastPredictedDate(createdAt);
          els.tableLoading.style.display = "none";
          els.dataTable.style.display = "table";
          currentPage = 1;
          renderTable();
          return true;
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("Erro ao carregar dados:", e);
          allData = [];
          filteredData = [];
          els.tableLoading.style.display = "none";
          els.dataTable.style.display = "none";
          els.tableError.style.display = "flex";
          els.tableErrorDetail.textContent =
            e.message || "Verifique sua conexão e tente novamente.";
          els.lastPredictedDate.textContent = "\u2014";
          return false;
        }
      }

      // Polls GetPredict until data appears (or attempts run out).
      async function loadAndRenderWithRetry(maxAttempts, intervalMs) {
        const ok = await loadAndRender();
        if (ok) return true;
        for (let i = 1; i < (maxAttempts || 4); i++) {
          await new Promise((res) => setTimeout(res, intervalMs || 2500));
          const ok2 = await loadAndRender({ skipLoading: true });
          if (ok2) return true;
        }
        return false;
      }

      // Atualiza o overlay de carregamento da página de previsões (estilo backtest).
      function setForecastLoading(state) {
        if (!state) {
          if (els.tableLoadingTitle) els.tableLoadingTitle.textContent = "Carregando previsões...";
          if (els.tableLoadingText) els.tableLoadingText.textContent = "Buscando dados em cache";
          if (els.tableLoadingBar) els.tableLoadingBar.style.width = "0%";
          if (els.tableLoadingLabel) els.tableLoadingLabel.textContent = "—";
          if (els.tableLoadingPct) els.tableLoadingPct.textContent = "—";
          return;
        }
        const { phase, totalSkus, processedTotal } = state;
        const total = totalSkus || 0;
        const done = processedTotal || 0;
        let pct = 0;
        if (phase === "finalize") pct = 100;
        else if (phase === "chunk" && total > 0) pct = Math.min(99, Math.round((done / total) * 100));
        else if (phase === "start") pct = 2;
        else if (phase === "loading") pct = 100;
        if (els.tableLoadingTitle) {
          els.tableLoadingTitle.textContent =
            phase === "finalize" ? "Finalizando previsão..."
            : phase === "loading" ? "Carregando resultados..."
            : "Realizando previsão...";
        }
        if (els.tableLoadingText) {
          if (phase === "start") els.tableLoadingText.textContent = "Iniciando processamento";
          else if (phase === "chunk") els.tableLoadingText.textContent = "Processando lotes de SKUs";
          else if (phase === "finalize") els.tableLoadingText.textContent = "Consolidando resultados";
          else if (phase === "loading") els.tableLoadingText.textContent = "Buscando dados em cache";
        }
        if (els.tableLoadingBar) els.tableLoadingBar.style.width = pct + "%";
        if (els.tableLoadingLabel) {
          els.tableLoadingLabel.textContent =
            total > 0 ? done + " de " + total + " SKUs" : "—";
        }
        if (els.tableLoadingPct) els.tableLoadingPct.textContent = pct + "%";
      }

      // Empty-state predict button
      els.emptyPredictBtn.addEventListener("click", async () => {
        els.emptyPredictBtn.disabled = true;
        els.emptyPredictBtn.querySelector(".material-icons").textContent =
          "hourglass_empty";
        const emptyLbl = els.emptyPredictBtn.querySelectorAll("span")[1];
        emptyLbl.textContent = "Iniciando...";
        // Mostra o overlay estilo backtest na área principal.
        els.tableEmpty.style.display = "none";
        els.dataTable.style.display = "none";
        els.tableError.style.display = "none";
        els.tableLoading.style.display = "flex";
        setForecastLoading({ phase: "start", totalSkus: 0, processedTotal: 0 });
        try {
          await requestNewPrediction((p) => {
            if (p.phase === "start") {
              emptyLbl.textContent =
                "Processando 0/" + (p.totalSkus || "?") + " SKUs...";
            } else if (p.phase === "chunk") {
              emptyLbl.textContent =
                "Processando " + p.processedTotal + "/" +
                (p.totalSkus || "?") + " SKUs...";
            } else if (p.phase === "finalize") {
              emptyLbl.textContent = "Finalizando...";
            }
            setForecastLoading(p);
          });
          setForecastLoading({ phase: "loading", totalSkus: 0, processedTotal: 0 });
          await loadAndRenderWithRetry(5, 2500);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("Erro ao realizar previsão:", e);
          els.tableEmpty.style.display = "none";
          els.tableError.style.display = "flex";
          els.tableErrorDetail.textContent =
            e.message || "Verifique sua conexão e tente novamente.";
        } finally {
          setForecastLoading(null);
          els.emptyPredictBtn.disabled = false;
          els.emptyPredictBtn.querySelector(".material-icons").textContent =
            "auto_awesome";
          els.emptyPredictBtn.querySelectorAll("span")[1].textContent =
            "Realizar Previsão";
        }
      });

      (function attachDownloadExcelHandler() {
        const btn = document.getElementById("downloadExcelBtn");
        if (btn) btn.addEventListener("click", downloadForecastExcel);
      })();

      // Predict button
      els.predictBtn.addEventListener("click", async () => {
        els.predictBtn.disabled = true;
        const lbl = els.predictBtn.querySelector("span");
        const originalLabel = lbl.textContent;
        lbl.textContent = "Iniciando...";
        // Garante que o usuário esteja na página de previsões para ver o progresso.
        try { showPage("forecast"); } catch (e) { /* noop */ }
        // Mostra estado de carregamento na área principal (mesmo UX do botão da página).
        els.tableEmpty.style.display = "none";
        els.dataTable.style.display = "none";
        els.tableError.style.display = "none";
        els.tableLoading.style.display = "flex";
        setForecastLoading({ phase: "start", totalSkus: 0, processedTotal: 0 });
        try {
          await requestNewPrediction((p) => {
            if (p.phase === "start") {
              lbl.textContent =
                "Processando 0/" + (p.totalSkus || "?");
            } else if (p.phase === "chunk") {
              lbl.textContent =
                "Processando " + p.processedTotal + "/" +
                (p.totalSkus || "?");
            } else if (p.phase === "finalize") {
              lbl.textContent = "Finalizando...";
            }
            setForecastLoading(p);
          });
          setForecastLoading({ phase: "loading", totalSkus: 0, processedTotal: 0 });
          await loadAndRenderWithRetry(5, 2500);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("Erro ao realizar previsão:", e);
          els.tableLoading.style.display = "none";
          els.dataTable.style.display = "none";
          els.tableError.style.display = "flex";
          els.tableErrorDetail.textContent =
            e.message || "Verifique sua conexão e tente novamente.";
        } finally {
          setForecastLoading(null);
          els.predictBtn.disabled = false;
          lbl.textContent = originalLabel || "Realizar Previsão";
          lucide.createIcons();
        }
      });

      // Reutiliza o mesmo UX do botão de previsão para retomar um run interrompido.
      async function resumePredictFlow(resumeState) {
        try { showPage("forecast"); } catch (e) { /* noop */ }
        els.predictBtn.disabled = true;
        const lbl = els.predictBtn.querySelector("span");
        const originalLabel = lbl.textContent;
        lbl.textContent = "Retomando...";
        els.tableEmpty.style.display = "none";
        els.dataTable.style.display = "none";
        els.tableError.style.display = "none";
        els.tableLoading.style.display = "flex";
        setForecastLoading({
          phase: "chunk",
          totalSkus: resumeState.totalSkus || 0,
          processedTotal: resumeState.processedTotal || 0,
        });
        try {
          await requestNewPrediction((p) => {
            if (p.phase === "chunk") {
              lbl.textContent = "Processando " + p.processedTotal + "/" + (p.totalSkus || "?");
            } else if (p.phase === "finalize") {
              lbl.textContent = "Finalizando...";
            }
            setForecastLoading(p);
          }, resumeState);
          setForecastLoading({ phase: "loading", totalSkus: 0, processedTotal: 0 });
          await loadAndRenderWithRetry(5, 2500);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("Erro ao retomar previsão:", e);
          els.tableLoading.style.display = "none";
          els.dataTable.style.display = "none";
          els.tableError.style.display = "flex";
          els.tableErrorDetail.textContent =
            e.message || "Verifique sua conexão e tente novamente.";
        } finally {
          setForecastLoading(null);
          els.predictBtn.disabled = false;
          lbl.textContent = originalLabel || "Realizar Previsão";
          lucide.createIcons();
        }
      }

      // Aviso ao tentar fechar/recarregar enquanto a previsão está processando.
      window.addEventListener("beforeunload", (e) => {
        if (predictIsRunning) {
          e.preventDefault();
          e.returnValue = "";
        }
      });

      // Detecta previsão interrompida e oferece retomar automaticamente.
      // O servidor mantém o agregado em Redis (TTL ~1h), então retomar é seguro.
      (function checkInterruptedPredict() {
        const prog = _pdLoadProgress();
        if (!prog || typeof prog.offset !== "number") return;
        // Se startedAt for muito antigo (>1h), o cache Redis pode ter expirado;
        // ainda assim tentamos retomar — se falhar, o usuário pode reiniciar.
        const total = prog.totalSkus || 0;
        const done = prog.processedTotal || 0;
        const banner = document.createElement("div");
        banner.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;left:50%;bottom:20px;transform:translateX(-50%);" +
          "background:#fff8e1;border:1px solid #f59e0b;color:#78350f;" +
          "padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.15);" +
          "z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;" +
          "font-size:13px;max-width:90vw;";
        banner.innerHTML =
          '<span>Previsão interrompida — ' + done + (total ? '/' + total : '') +
          ' SKUs processados.</span>' +
          '<button id="pdResumeBtn" style="padding:5px 12px;border:none;border-radius:6px;background:#f59e0b;color:#fff;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Retomar</button>' +
          '<button id="pdDiscardBtn" style="padding:5px 12px;border:none;border-radius:6px;background:#e5e7eb;color:#374151;cursor:pointer;">Descartar</button>';
        document.body.appendChild(banner);
        document.getElementById("pdResumeBtn").addEventListener("click", () => {
          banner.remove();
          resumePredictFlow(prog);
        });
        document.getElementById("pdDiscardBtn").addEventListener("click", () => {
          _pdClearProgress();
          banner.remove();
        });
      })();

      // ============================================
      // PAGE NAVIGATION
      // ============================================
      const forecastSection = document.getElementById("forecastSection");
      const usersSection = document.getElementById("usersSection");
      const testesSection = document.getElementById("testesSection");
      const chatSection = document.getElementById("chatSection");

      function showPage(page) {
        document.querySelectorAll(".nav-item").forEach((btn) => {
          if (btn.id === "predictBtn") return;
          btn.classList.toggle("active", btn.dataset.page === page);
        });
        forecastSection.style.display = page === "forecast" ? "" : "none";
        usersSection.classList.toggle("active", page === "users");
        testesSection.classList.toggle("active", page === "testes");
        chatSection.classList.toggle("active", page === "chat");
        if (page === "users") loadUsers();
        if (page === "testes") openBacktestPage();
        if (page === "chat") {
          if (typeof renderHistoryList === "function") renderHistoryList();
          focusChatInput();
        }
      }

      document.querySelectorAll(".nav-item[data-page]").forEach((btn) => {
        if (btn.id === "predictBtn") return;
        btn.addEventListener("click", () => showPage(btn.dataset.page));
      });

      // ============================================
      // ASSISTENTE IA (CHAT)
      // ============================================
      const chatEls = {
        scroll: document.getElementById("chatMessages"),
        messages: document.getElementById("chatMessagesContainer"),
        empty: document.getElementById("chatEmpty"),
        typing: document.getElementById("chatTyping"),
        form: document.getElementById("chatForm"),
        input: document.getElementById("chatInput"),
        sendBtn: document.getElementById("chatSendBtn"),
        clearBtn: document.getElementById("chatClearBtn"),
        history: document.getElementById("chatHistory"),
        historyList: document.getElementById("chatHistoryList"),
        newBtn: document.getElementById("chatNewBtn"),
        historyToggle: document.getElementById("chatHistoryToggle"),
      };
      let chatSessionId = null;
      let chatBusy = false;

      function focusChatInput() {
        setTimeout(() => chatEls.input && chatEls.input.focus(), 80);
      }

      function ensureChatSession() {
        if (chatSessionId) return chatSessionId;
        const rnd = Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10);
        chatSessionId = "u_" + (currentUserId || "anon") + "__" + rnd;
        return chatSessionId;
      }

      // ---- Índice local de conversas (por usuário) -----------------
      function chatStoreKey() {
        return "universo_chat_sessions__" + (currentUserId || "anon");
      }
      function loadChatSessions() {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(chatStoreKey());
          const arr = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
          return Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : [];
        } catch (e) {
          return [];
        }
      }
      function saveChatSessions(arr) {
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(chatStoreKey(), JSON.stringify(arr.slice(0, 50)));
        } catch (e) {}
      }
      function upsertChatSession(id, firstMessage) {
        const sessions = loadChatSessions();
        const now = Date.now();
        const existing = sessions.find((s) => s.id === id);
        if (existing) {
          existing.updatedAt = now;
        } else {
          const title = (firstMessage || "Nova conversa")
            .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
            .trim()
            .slice(0, 60);
          sessions.push({ id, title, createdAt: now, updatedAt: now });
        }
        sessions.sort((a, b) => (b.updatedAt || 0) - (a.updatedAt || 0));
        saveChatSessions(sessions);
        renderHistoryList();
      }
      function deleteChatSession(id) {
        const sessions = loadChatSessions().filter((s) => s.id !== id);
        saveChatSessions(sessions);
        if (id === chatSessionId) startNewChat();
        else renderHistoryList();
        deleteChatSessionRemote(id);
      }
      async function deleteChatSessionRemote(id) {
        try {
          const {
            data: { session },
          } = await supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
          if (!session) return;
          const url =
            API_CHAT_DELETE + "?sessionId=" + encodeURIComponent(id);
          await fetch(url, {
            method: "DELETE",
            headers: { Authorization: "Bearer " + session.access_token },
          });
        } catch (e) {
          /* exclusão local já aplicada; ignora falha de rede */
        }
      }
      function timeAgo(ts) {
        if (!ts) return "";
        const diff = Date.now() - ts;
        const m = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
        if (m < 1) return "agora";
        if (m < 60) return m + " min";
        const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
        if (h < 24) return h + "h";
        const d = Math.floor(h / 24);
        if (d < 7) return d + "d";
        return new Date(ts).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR");
      }
      function renderHistoryList() {
        const list = chatEls.historyList;
        if (!list) return;
        const sessions = loadChatSessions();
        list.innerHTML = "";
        if (!sessions.length) {
          list.innerHTML =
            '<div class="chat-history-empty">Nenhuma conversa anterior.<br>Comece a perguntar para criar uma.</div>';
          return;
        }
        sessions.forEach((s) => {
          const item = document.createElement("button");
          item.type = "button";
          item.className =
            "chat-history-item" + (s.id === chatSessionId ? " active" : "");
          item.title = s.title;

          const icon = document.createElement("i");
          icon.setAttribute("data-lucide", "message-square");
          const title = document.createElement("span");
          title.className = "chat-history-title";
          title.textContent = s.title || "Conversa";
          const del = document.createElement("span");
          del.className = "chat-history-del";
          del.title = "Excluir da lista";
          del.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="trash-2"></i>';
          del.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            deleteChatSession(s.id);
          });

          item.appendChild(icon);
          item.appendChild(title);
          item.appendChild(del);
          item.addEventListener("click", () => loadChatSession(s.id));
          list.appendChild(item);
        });
        if (window.lucide && lucide.createIcons) lucide.createIcons();
      }

      // ---- Carregamento de histórico do banco (via n8n) ------------
      function parseHistoryMessage(row) {
        let m = row && row.message;
        if (typeof m === "string") {
          try {
            m = JSON.parse(m);
          } catch (e) {
            return null;
          }
        }
        if (!m || typeof m !== "object") return null;
        const type = m.type || (m.data && m.data.type);
        const content = m.data ? m.data.content : m.content;
        if (content == null) return null;
        const role =
          type === "human" || type === "user" ? "user" : "assistant";
        return { role, content: String(content) };
      }
      async function fetchChatHistory(sid) {
        const {
          data: { session },
        } = await supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
        if (!session) throw new Error("Sessão expirada. Faça login novamente.");
        const url = API_CHAT_HISTORY + "?sessionId=" + encodeURIComponent(sid);
        const r = await fetch(url, {
          headers: { Authorization: "Bearer " + session.access_token },
        });
        if (!r.ok) {
          const errTxt = await r.text();
          throw new Error(
            "Erro " + r.status + (errTxt ? ": " + errTxt.slice(0, 160) : "")
          );
        }
        const data = await r.json().catch(() => null);
        return Array.isArray(data) ? data : data ? [data] : [];
      }
      async function loadChatSession(id) {
        if (chatBusy) return;
        chatSessionId = id;
        chatEls.messages.innerHTML = "";
        if (chatEls.empty) chatEls.empty.style.display = "none";
        if (chatEls.history) chatEls.history.classList.remove("open");
        renderHistoryList();
        setChatBusy(true);
        showChatTyping(true);
        try {
          const rows = await fetchChatHistory(id);
          showChatTyping(false);
          let count = 0;
          rows.forEach((row) => {
            const pm = parseHistoryMessage(row);
            if (pm) {
              appendChatMessage(pm.role, pm.content);
              count++;
            }
          });
          if (!count && chatEls.empty) chatEls.empty.style.display = "";
        } catch (err) {
          showChatTyping(false);
          appendChatMessage(
            "assistant",
            "⚠️ Não foi possível carregar o histórico desta conversa: " +
              (err.message || "erro desconhecido")
          );
        } finally {
          setChatBusy(false);
          focusChatInput();
        }
      }
      function startNewChat() {
        chatSessionId = null;
        if (chatEls.messages) chatEls.messages.innerHTML = "";
        showChatTyping(false);
        if (chatEls.empty) chatEls.empty.style.display = "";
        if (chatEls.history) chatEls.history.classList.remove("open");
        renderHistoryList();
        focusChatInput();
      }

      function scrollChatToBottom() {
        if (chatEls.scroll)
          chatEls.scroll.scrollTop = chatEls.scroll.scrollHeight;
      }

      // Renderiza markdown com a biblioteca marked (com fallback simples).
      function renderMarkdown(text) {
        const src = String(text || "");
        if (typeof marked !== "undefined" && marked.parse) {
          try {
            return marked.parse(src, { breaks: true, gfm: true });
          } catch (e) {}
        }
        const esc = src
          .replace(/&/g, "&")
          .replace(/</g, "<")
          .replace(/>/g, ">")
          .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, "<strong>$1</strong>");
        return "<p>" + esc.replace(/\n{2,}/g, "</p><p>").replace(/\n/g, "<br>") + "</p>";
      }

      // Aplica as classes de cor nas seções H2 com base no emoji inicial.
      function colorizeSections(container) {
        container.querySelectorAll("h2").forEach((h) => {
          const t = (h.textContent || "").trim();
          if (/^✅|^✔|^✓/.test(t)) h.classList.add("sec-spec");
          else if (/^⚠|^❌|^🚫/.test(t)) h.classList.add("sec-warn");
          else if (/^🧮|^📊|^🔢|^🏢|^📋/.test(t)) h.classList.add("sec-info");
          else if (/^🧾|^➡|^👉|^🚀|^🎯/.test(t)) h.classList.add("sec-cta");
        });
        container.querySelectorAll("a").forEach((link) => {
          link.setAttribute("target", "_blank");
          link.setAttribute("rel", "noopener noreferrer");
        });
      }

      function appendChatMessage(role, text) {
        if (chatEls.empty) chatEls.empty.style.display = "none";
        const wrap = document.createElement("div");
        wrap.className = "message " + role;

        const avatar = document.createElement("div");
        avatar.className = "message-avatar " + role;
        avatar.innerHTML =
          role === "user"
            ? '<i data-lucide="user"></i>'
            : '<i data-lucide="bot"></i>';

        const content = document.createElement("div");
        content.className = "message-content";
        if (role === "assistant") {
          content.innerHTML = renderMarkdown(text);
          colorizeSections(content);
        } else {
          content.textContent = String(text || "");
        }

        wrap.appendChild(avatar);
        wrap.appendChild(content);
        chatEls.messages.appendChild(wrap);
        if (window.lucide && lucide.createIcons) lucide.createIcons();
        scrollChatToBottom();
        return content;
      }

      function showChatTyping(show) {
        if (!chatEls.typing) return;
        chatEls.typing.style.display = show ? "flex" : "none";
        if (show) {
          if (window.lucide && lucide.createIcons) lucide.createIcons();
          scrollChatToBottom();
        }
      }

      function setChatBusy(busy) {
        chatBusy = busy;
        if (chatEls.sendBtn) chatEls.sendBtn.disabled = busy;
        if (chatEls.input) chatEls.input.disabled = busy;
      }

      async function sendChatMessage(text) {
        const message = (text || "").trim();
        if (!message || chatBusy) return;
        const sid = ensureChatSession();
        upsertChatSession(sid, message);
        appendChatMessage("user", message);
        chatEls.input.value = "";
        chatEls.input.style.height = "auto";
        setChatBusy(true);
        showChatTyping(true);
        try {
          const {
            data: { session },
          } = await supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
          if (!session) throw new Error("Sessão expirada. Faça login novamente.");
          const r = await fetch(API_CHAT, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: {
              "Content-Type": "application/json",
              Authorization: "Bearer " + session.access_token,
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              sessionId: sid,
              chatInput: message,
            }),
          });
          if (!r.ok) {
            const errTxt = await r.text();
            throw new Error(
              r.status === 401 || r.status === 403
                ? "Sem permissão para usar o assistente."
                : "Erro " + r.status + (errTxt ? ": " + errTxt.slice(0, 160) : "")
            );
          }
          const payload = await r.json().catch(() => null);
          const reply =
            (payload &&
              (payload.output ||
                payload.text ||
                payload.reply ||
                payload.response ||
                (Array.isArray(payload) && payload[0] && payload[0].output))) ||
            "Não recebi uma resposta válida.";
          showChatTyping(false);
          appendChatMessage("assistant", String(reply));
        } catch (err) {
          showChatTyping(false);
          appendChatMessage(
            "assistant",
            "⚠️ " + (err.message || "Falha ao falar com o assistente.")
          );
        } finally {
          setChatBusy(false);
          scrollChatToBottom();
          focusChatInput();
        }
      }

      if (chatEls.form) {

      const userModal = document.getElementById("userModal");

      function escapeHtml(str) {
        const d = document.createElement("div");

      async function loadUsers() {
        const usersLoading = document.getElementById("usersLoading");
        const usersTable = document.getElementById("usersTable");
        usersLoading.style.display = "flex";
        usersTable.style.display = "none";
        try {
          const { data, error } = await supabaseClient.rpc(
            "universo_t_admin_list_users",
          );
          if (error) throw error;
          document.getElementById("usersCount").textContent = data.length;
          const tbody = document.getElementById("usersTableBody");
          tbody.innerHTML = "";
          data.forEach((u) => {
            const tr = document.createElement("tr");
            const created = new Date(u.created_at).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR");
            const roleClass = u.role || "visualizador";
            const roleLabel = ROLE_LABELS[u.role] || u.role;

            tr.innerHTML =
              "<td>" +
              escapeHtml(u.full_name || "\u2014") +
              "</td>" +
              "<td>" +
              escapeHtml(u.email) +
              "</td>" +
              '<td><span class="role-badge ' +
              roleClass +
              '">' +
              roleLabel +
              "</span></td>" +
              "<td>" +
              created +
              "</td>" +
              '<td style="display:flex;gap:6px">' +
              '<button class="action-btn edit-user-btn" title="Editar"><span class="material-icons" style="font-size:16px">edit</span></button>' +
              (u.user_id === currentUserId
                ? ""
                : '<button class="action-btn danger delete-user-btn" title="Excluir"><span class="material-icons" style="font-size:16px">delete</span></button>') +
              "</td>";
            tr.querySelector(".edit-user-btn").addEventListener("click", () =>
              openEditUser(u),
            );
            const delBtn = tr.querySelector(".delete-user-btn");
            if (delBtn) {
              delBtn.addEventListener("click", () => openDeleteUser(u));
            }
            tbody.appendChild(tr);
          });
          usersLoading.style.display = "none";
          usersTable.style.display = "table";
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Erro ao carregar usuários:", err);
          usersLoading.style.display = "none";
        }

        document.getElementById("roleField").style.display = "";

      // EDIT
      function openEditUser(user) {
        editingUserId = user.user_id;
        document.getElementById("userModalTitle").textContent =
          "Editar Usuário";
        document.getElementById("emailField").style.display = "none";
        document.getElementById("passwordField").style.display = "none";
        document.getElementById("roleField").style.display = "";
        document.getElementById("modalPassword").required = false;
        document.getElementById("modalFullName").value = user.full_name || "";
        document.getElementById("modalRole").value =

      // MODAL SAVE
      userModalForm.addEventListener("submit", async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const saveBtn = document.getElementById("modalSaveBtn");
        const errorEl = document.getElementById("modalError");
        errorEl.style.display = "none";
        saveBtn.disabled = true;
        saveBtn.textContent = "Salvando...";
        try {
          if (editingUserId) {
            const isSelf = editingUserId === currentUserId;
            const payload = {
              p_user_id: editingUserId,
              p_full_name: document
                .getElementById("modalFullName")
                .value.trim(),
            };

              payload.p_role = document.getElementById("modalRole").value;

            const { error } = await supabaseClient.rpc(
              "universo_t_admin_update_user",
              payload,
            );

            const email = document.getElementById("modalEmail").value.trim();
            const password = document.getElementById("modalPassword").value;
            const fullName = document
              .getElementById("modalFullName")
              .value.trim();

            const { data: signupData, error: signupError } =
              await supabaseClient.auth.signUp({

                password,

                    full_name: fullName,
                    role: role,
                    company_name: "universo_tintas",

                "universo_t_admin_confirm_user",
                { p_user_id: signupData.user.id },
              );
              if (confirmError)
                console.error("Erro ao confirmar e-mail:", confirmError);
            }
          }
          userModal.classList.remove("active");
          await loadUsers();

          errorEl.textContent = err.message || "Erro ao salvar usuário.";
          errorEl.style.display = "block";
        } finally {
          saveBtn.disabled = false;
          saveBtn.textContent = "Salvar";
        }

          return;
