      // ============================================
      // HISTORY UPLOAD (drag & drop)
      // ============================================
      function setDropStatus(msg, kind) {
        if (!els.dropStatus) return;
        els.dropStatus.textContent = msg || "";
        els.dropStatus.className = "drop-status" + (kind ? " " + kind : "");
      }

      // ----- persistent upload state -----
      const HISTORY_STATE_KEY = "ut_history_state_v1";
      let uploading = false;

      function setUploadingUI(isOn) {
        uploading = isOn;
        if (!els.dropZone) return;
        els.dropZone.classList.toggle("uploading", isOn);
        if (els.chooseFileBtn) els.chooseFileBtn.disabled = isOn;
        if (els.fileInput) els.fileInput.disabled = isOn;
        if (els.predictBtn) els.predictBtn.disabled = isOn;
      }

      function loadHistoryState() {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(HISTORY_STATE_KEY);
          return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
        } catch (e) { return null; }
      }
      function saveHistoryState(state) {
        try { localStorage.setItem(HISTORY_STATE_KEY, JSON.stringify(state)); } catch (e) {}
      }
      function renderHistoryStateChip() {
        const s = loadHistoryState();
        if (!s || !els.dropStatus) return;
        const when = s.uploadedAt ? new Date(s.uploadedAt).toLocaleString("pt-BR") : "";
        setDropStatus(
          "Último upload: " + s.fileName + (when ? " (" + when + ")" : ""),
          "ok",
        );
      }

      async function uploadHistoryFile(file) {
        if (!file) return;
        if (uploading) return;
        if (!/\.xlsx?$/i.test(file.name)) {
          setDropStatus("Apenas arquivos .xlsx são suportados.", "err");
          return;
        }
        setUploadingUI(true);
        setDropStatus("Enviando " + file.name + "...", "");
        const fd = new FormData();
        fd.append("data", file, file.name);
        try {
          const r = await fetch(API_REPLACE_HISTORY, { method: "POST", body: fd });
          const body = await r.text();
          if (!r.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + r.status + (body ? ": " + body.slice(0, 200) : ""));
          saveHistoryState({ fileName: file.name, uploadedAt: new Date().toISOString() });
          setDropStatus(
            "Histórico " + file.name + " carregado. Clique em 'Realizar Previsão' para gerar a nova previsão.",
            "ok",
          );
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Upload error:", err);
          setDropStatus(err.message || "Falha no upload. Tente novamente.", "err");
        } finally {
          setUploadingUI(false);
        }
      }

      if (els.dropZone) {
        const dz = els.dropZone;
        ["dragenter", "dragover"].forEach((ev) =>
          dz.addEventListener(ev, (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
            if (!uploading) dz.classList.add("dragover");
          }),
        );
        ["dragleave", "drop"].forEach((ev) =>
          dz.addEventListener(ev, (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
            dz.classList.remove("dragover");
          }),
        );
        dz.addEventListener("drop", (e) => {
          if (uploading) return;
          const file = e.dataTransfer && e.dataTransfer.files[0];
          if (file) uploadHistoryFile(file);
        });
        els.chooseFileBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
          if (!uploading) els.fileInput.click();
        });
        els.fileInput.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
          const file = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];
          if (file) uploadHistoryFile(file);
          els.fileInput.value = "";
        });
        renderHistoryStateChip();
      }

      // ============================================
      // BACKTEST PAGE
      // ============================================
      let backtestData = [];
      let backtestSummary = [];

      const backtestSelectedMonths = new Set();
      let backtestMonthKeys = [];

      function updateBacktestSelectedCount() {
        const el = document.getElementById("backtestSelectedCount");
        if (el) el.textContent = backtestSelectedMonths.size + " selecionados";
      }

      function renderBacktestMonthGrid() {
        const grid = els.backtestMonths;
        if (!grid) return;
        grid.innerHTML = "";
        backtestMonthKeys.forEach((k) => {
          const lbl = document.createElement("label");
          lbl.className = "month-chip" + (backtestSelectedMonths.has(k) ? " selected" : "");
          lbl.dataset.key = k;
          lbl.innerHTML =
            '<input type="checkbox" value="' + k + '"' +
            (backtestSelectedMonths.has(k) ? " checked" : "") +
            '/><span>' + formatMonth(k) + '</span>';
          lbl.querySelector("input").addEventListener("change", (ev) => {
            if (ev.target.checked) backtestSelectedMonths.add(k);
            else backtestSelectedMonths.delete(k);
            lbl.classList.toggle("selected", ev.target.checked);
            updateBacktestSelectedCount();
          });
          grid.appendChild(lbl);
        });
        updateBacktestSelectedCount();
      }

      async function openBacktestPage() {
        if (!els.backtestMonths) return;
        if (backtestMonthKeys.length > 0) {
          renderBacktestMonthGrid();
          return;
        }
        let lastKey = null;
        try {
          const resp = await fetchPredictions();
          const wrap = Array.isArray(resp) ? resp[0] : resp;
          if (wrap && wrap.validation && wrap.validation.lastHistoryMonth) {
            lastKey = wrap.validation.lastHistoryMonth;
          }
        } catch (e) {}
        if (!lastKey) {
          const n = new Date();
          let m = n.getMonth();
          let y = n.getFullYear();
          if (m === 0) { m = 12; y--; }
          lastKey = y + "-" + String(m).padStart(2, "0");
        }
        const [ly, lm] = lastKey.split("-").map((v) => parseInt(v, 10));
        let yy = ly;
        let mm = lm;
        backtestMonthKeys = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < 24; i++) {
          backtestMonthKeys.push(yy + "-" + String(mm).padStart(2, "0"));
          mm--;
          if (mm < 1) { mm = 12; yy--; }
        }
        renderBacktestMonthGrid();
      }

      function selectLastNBacktestMonths(n) {
        backtestSelectedMonths.clear();
        backtestMonthKeys.slice(0, n).forEach((k) => backtestSelectedMonths.add(k));
        renderBacktestMonthGrid();
      }

      document.getElementById("btSelectLast3")
        .addEventListener("click", () => selectLastNBacktestMonths(3));
      document.getElementById("btSelectLast6")
        .addEventListener("click", () => selectLastNBacktestMonths(6));
      document.getElementById("btSelectClear")
        .addEventListener("click", () => { backtestSelectedMonths.clear(); renderBacktestMonthGrid(); });

      function classifyError(pct, tol) {
        if (pct == null) return "";
        if (pct <= (tol || 10)) return "good";
        if (pct <= (tol || 10) * 2) return "warn";
        return "bad";
      }

      function renderBacktest() {
        const tbody = els.backtestTableBody;
        const thead = els.backtestTableHead;
        const q = (els.backtestSearch.value || "").toLowerCase().trim();
        tbody.innerHTML = "";
        thead.innerHTML = "";

        if (!backtestData.length) {
          els.backtestResultsCard.style.display = "none";
          return;
        }

        // Meses únicos presentes (ordem cronológica crescente)
        const monthSet = new Set();
        backtestData.forEach((r) => monthSet.add(r.mes));
        const months = Array.from(monthSet).sort();

        // Agrupa por SKU
        const bySku = new Map();
        backtestData.forEach((r) => {
          const k = String(r.SKU);
          let entry = bySku.get(k);
          if (!entry) {
            entry = {
              SKU: r.SKU,
              Descricao: r["Descrição"] || "",
              Formato: r.Formato || "",
              tolerancePct: r.tolerancePct,
              months: {},
            };
            bySku.set(k, entry);
          }
          entry.months[r.mes] = r;
          // mantém último valor não-nulo de descrição/formato/tolerância
          if (r["Descrição"]) entry.Descricao = r["Descrição"];
          if (r.Formato) entry.Formato = r.Formato;
          if (r.tolerancePct != null) entry.tolerancePct = r.tolerancePct;
        });

        let rows = Array.from(bySku.values());

        // Filtro
        if (q) {
          rows = rows.filter(
            (r) =>
              String(r.SKU).toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
              (r.Descricao || "").toLowerCase().includes(q),
          );
        }

        // WAPE por SKU (Σ|prev−real| / Σ|real|) para ordenar piores → melhores
        rows.forEach((r) => {
          let num = 0,
            den = 0,
            n = 0;
          months.forEach((m) => {
            const c = r.months[m];
            if (c && c.real != null && c.previsto != null) {
              num += Math.abs(c.previsto - c.real);
              den += Math.abs(c.real);
              n += 1;
            }
          });
          r._avgErr = n && den > 0 ? (num / den) * 100 : null;
          r._withReal = n;
        });
        rows.sort((a, b) => {
          if (a._avgErr == null && b._avgErr == null) return 0;
          if (a._avgErr == null) return 1;
          if (b._avgErr == null) return -1;
          return b._avgErr - a._avgErr;
        });

        // Cabeçalho com 2 linhas: meses agrupados + sub-headers
        const subCols = 3;
        let topHead =
          "<tr>" +
          '<th rowspan="2">SKU</th>' +
          '<th rowspan="2">Descrição</th>' +
          '<th rowspan="2">Formato</th>';
        let subHead = "<tr>";
        months.forEach((m) => {
          topHead +=
            '<th colspan="' + subCols + '" class="numeric month-group">' +
            formatMonth(m) +
            "</th>";
          subHead +=
            '<th class="numeric sub">Faixa mín.</th>' +
            '<th class="numeric sub">Faixa máx.</th>' +
            '<th class="numeric sub">Real</th>';
        });
        topHead += '<th rowspan="2" class="numeric" title="Σ|previsto − real| / Σ|real| nos meses do backtest">WAPE</th></tr>';
        subHead += "</tr>";
        thead.innerHTML = topHead + subHead;

        // Linhas
        const limit = 500;
        const truncated = rows.length > limit;
        rows.slice(0, limit).forEach((r) => {
          const tr = document.createElement("tr");
          let html =
            '<td><span class="sku-code">' +
            r.SKU +
            "</span></td>" +
            '<td><span class="product-desc" title="' +
            (r.Descricao || "").replace(/"/g, """) +
            '">' +
            (r.Descricao || "") +
            "</span></td>" +
            "<td>" +
            (r.Formato || "—") +
            "</td>";

          months.forEach((m) => {
            const c = r.months[m];
            if (!c) {
              for (let i = 0; i < subCols; i++) {
                html += '<td class="numeric muted">—</td>';
              }
            } else {
              const errCls = classifyError(c.errorPct, c.tolerancePct);
              // Marcador único por célula (prioridade: regime > fence > cap > selector v1 > bias).
              // Mantém o tooltip rico, mas evita poluição visual.
              let adjBadge = "";
              let adjKind = "";
              if (c.damping) {
                if (c.damping.regimeShift) {
                  adjKind = c.damping.regimeShift.direction === "collapse" ? "regime-down" : "regime-up";
                } else if (c.damping.fenceApplied || c.damping.hardCapApplied) {
                  adjKind = "fence";
                } else if (c.damping.capApplied || c.damping.wasCapped) {
                  adjKind = "cap";
                } else if (c.damping.selector && c.damping.selector !== "v2") {
                  adjKind = "v1sel";
                } else if (c.damping.biasFactor != null && c.damping.biasFactor !== 1) {
                  adjKind = c.damping.biasFactor < 1 ? "bias-down" : "bias-up";
                }
                if (adjKind) adjBadge = ' <span class="adj-dot adj-' + adjKind + '"></span>';
              }
              const tooltip = c.damping
                ? "wRecent: " + (c.damping.wRecent != null ? c.damping.wRecent.toFixed(2) : "0") +
                  " · bias: " + (c.damping.biasFactor != null ? c.damping.biasFactor.toFixed(2) : "1.00") +
                  " · overshoot hist: " + (c.damping.overshootRate != null ? (c.damping.overshootRate * 100).toFixed(0) + "%" : "—") +
                  " · cap: " + (c.damping.capApplied ? "sim" : "não") +
                  (c.damping.fenceApplied && c.damping.fenceInfo
                    ? " · fence (" + c.damping.fenceInfo.direction + "): " +
                      c.damping.fenceInfo.fence.toLocaleString("pt-BR") +
                      (c.damping.fenceInfo.ratioCap != null ? " [ratio " + c.damping.fenceInfo.ratioCap.toLocaleString("pt-BR") + "]" : "") +
                      (c.damping.fenceInfo.tukeyCap != null ? " [tukey " + c.damping.fenceInfo.tukeyCap.toLocaleString("pt-BR") + "]" : "") +
                      " (recent " + (c.damping.fenceInfo.recentLevel != null ? c.damping.fenceInfo.recentLevel.toLocaleString("pt-BR") : "—") + ")"
                    : "") +
                  (c.damping.regimeShift
                    ? " · regime " + c.damping.regimeShift.direction +
                      " (ratio " + c.damping.regimeShift.currentRatio +
                      " vs fence " + c.damping.regimeShift.fenceRatio +
                      ", pull " + (c.damping.regimeShift.pullWeight * 100).toFixed(0) + "%)"
                    : "") +
                  (c.damping.selector
                    ? " · LOO selector: " + c.damping.selector +
                      (c.damping.looErrV1 != null && c.damping.looErrV2 != null
                        ? " (errV1 " + c.damping.looErrV1 + " vs errV2 " + c.damping.looErrV2 + ")"
                        : "")
                    : "") +
                  " · amostras emp: " + (c.damping.empSamples || 0) +
                  " (recent12 " + (c.damping.recentSamples || 0) + ")" +
                  " · calibrado em " + (c.damping.wRecentSamples || 0) + " anos"
                : "sem damping";
              const _tol = c.tolerancePct != null ? c.tolerancePct : 0;
              const _faixaMin = Math.max(0, c.previsto * (1 - _tol / 100));
              const _faixaMax = c.previsto * (1 + _tol / 100);
              html +=
                '<td class="numeric" title="' + tooltip.replace(/"/g, """) + '">' +
                formatValue(_faixaMin) +
                adjBadge +
                "</td>" +
                '<td class="numeric">' +
                formatValue(_faixaMax) +
                "</td>" +
                '<td class="numeric err-cell ' + errCls + '">' +
                (c.real != null ? formatValue(c.real) : "—") +
                "</td>";
            }
          });

          const avgCls =
            r._avgErr == null
              ? ""
              : classifyError(r._avgErr, r.tolerancePct);
          html +=
            '<td class="numeric err-cell ' +
            avgCls +
            '">' +
            (r._avgErr != null
              ? r._avgErr.toFixed(1).replace(".", ",") + "%"
              : "—") +
            "</td>";

          tr.innerHTML = html;
          tbody.appendChild(tr);
        });

        if (truncated) {
          const tr = document.createElement("tr");
          const cols =
            3 + months.length * subCols + 1;
          tr.innerHTML =
            '<td colspan="' +
            cols +
            '" style="text-align:center;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;padding:14px">' +
            "Mostrando os " +
            limit +
            " primeiros SKUs (de " +
            rows.length +
            "). Use a busca para refinar.</td>";
          tbody.appendChild(tr);
        }

        els.backtestResultsCard.style.display = "";
      }

      function renderBacktestSummary() {
        const el = els.backtestSummary;
        if (!backtestSummary.length) {
          el.style.display = "none";
          el.innerHTML = "";
          return;
        }
        let totalSkus = 0,
          totalHits = 0,
          mapeSum = 0,
          mapeN = 0,
          withinSum = 0,
          withinN = 0,
          realTotal = 0,
          prevTotal = 0;
        backtestSummary.forEach((s) => {
          totalSkus += s.skus || 0;
          totalHits += s.skusComReal || 0;
          if (s.mape != null) {
            mapeSum += s.mape * (s.skusComReal || 1);
            mapeN += s.skusComReal || 1;
          }
          if (s.pctDentroTolerancia != null) {
            withinSum += s.pctDentroTolerancia * (s.skusComReal || 1);
            withinN += s.skusComReal || 1;
          }
          realTotal += s.realTotal || 0;
          prevTotal += s.prevTotal || 0;
        });
        // WAPE global direto de backtestData
        let wapeNum = 0, wapeDen = 0;
        backtestData.forEach((row) => {
          if (row.errorAbs == null || row.real == null) return;
          wapeNum += row.errorAbs;
          wapeDen += Math.abs(row.real);
        });
        // Mecanismos v2: contagem de SKUs afetados
        let v2Capped = 0, v2HardCap = 0, v2BiasedDown = 0, v2BiasedUp = 0,
            v2DampingHigh = 0, v2Calibrated = 0, v2WithDamping = 0,
            v2RegimeCollapse = 0, v2RegimeBoom = 0,
            v2SelectV1 = 0, v2SelectV2 = 0;
        backtestData.forEach((row) => {
          const d = row.damping;
          if (!d) return;
          v2WithDamping += 1;
          if (d.capApplied || d.wasCapped) v2Capped += 1;
          if (d.fenceApplied || d.hardCapApplied) v2HardCap += 1;
          if (d.biasFactor != null && d.biasFactor < 1) v2BiasedDown += 1;
          if (d.biasFactor != null && d.biasFactor > 1) v2BiasedUp += 1;
          if (d.wRecent != null && d.wRecent >= 0.5) v2DampingHigh += 1;
          if (d.calibrated) v2Calibrated += 1;
          if (d.regimeShift && d.regimeShift.direction === "collapse") v2RegimeCollapse += 1;
          if (d.regimeShift && d.regimeShift.direction === "boom") v2RegimeBoom += 1;
          if (d.selector === "v1" || d.selector === "v1+regime" || d.selector === "v1+momentum") v2SelectV1 += 1;
          else if (d.selector === "v2") v2SelectV2 += 1;
        });
        const globalMape = mapeN ? mapeSum / mapeN : null;
        const globalWithin = withinN ? withinSum / withinN : null;
        const globalWape = wapeDen > 0 ? (wapeNum / wapeDen) * 100 : null;

        function mapeClass(v) {
          if (v == null) return "";
          if (v <= 15) return "good";
          if (v <= 30) return "warn";
          return "bad";
        }
        function withinClass(v) {
          if (v == null) return "";
          if (v >= 70) return "good";
          if (v >= 50) return "warn";
          return "bad";
        }
        function fmtPct(v) {
          return v == null ? "—" : v.toFixed(2).replace(".", ",") + "%";
        }
        function fmtNum(v) {
          return v == null ? "—" : Math.round(v).toLocaleString("pt-BR");
        }
        function fmtSigned(v) {
          if (v == null) return "—";
          const s = v >= 0 ? "+" : "";
          return s + Math.round(v).toLocaleString("pt-BR");
        }

        const overpro = prevTotal - realTotal;
        const globalCards =
          '<div class="summary-card global">' +
          '<div class="lbl">MAPE médio geral</div>' +
          '<div class="val ' + mapeClass(globalMape) + '">' +
          fmtPct(globalMape) +
          "</div>" +
          '<div class="sub">erro percentual médio absoluto (menor é melhor)</div>' +
          "</div>" +
          '<div class="summary-card global">' +
          '<div class="lbl">WAPE (impacto real)</div>' +
          '<div class="val ' + mapeClass(globalWape) + '">' +
          fmtPct(globalWape) +
          "</div>" +
          '<div class="sub">erro ponderado por volume</div>' +
          "</div>" +
          '<div class="summary-card global">' +
          '<div class="lbl">Excesso de produção</div>' +
          '<div class="val ' + (overpro >= 0 ? "warn" : "good") + '">' +
          fmtSigned(overpro) +
          "</div>" +
          '<div class="sub">previsto ' + fmtNum(prevTotal) +
          " vs real " + fmtNum(realTotal) + "</div>" +
          "</div>" +
          '<div class="summary-card global">' +
          '<div class="lbl">Taxa de acerto</div>' +
          '<div class="val ' + withinClass(globalWithin) + '">' +
          fmtPct(globalWithin) +
          "</div>" +
          '<div class="sub">' + totalHits + " de " + totalSkus +
          " SKUs com real · dentro da tolerância</div>" +
          "</div>" +
          '<div class="summary-card global">' +
          '<div class="lbl">Ajustes aplicados (por SKU)</div>' +
          '<div class="val">' +
          v2Calibrated + " / " + v2WithDamping +
          "</div>" +
          '<div class="sub">fence: ' + v2HardCap +
          " · soft cap: " + v2Capped +
          "<br>regime colapso: " + v2RegimeCollapse +
          " · regime boom: " + v2RegimeBoom +
          "<br>viés baixo: " + v2BiasedDown +
          " · viés alto: " + v2BiasedUp +
          "<br>damping forte (w≥0,5): " + v2DampingHigh +
          "<br>LOO escolheu v1: " + v2SelectV1 +
          " · v2: " + v2SelectV2 +
          "</div>" +
          "</div>";

        const monthCards = backtestSummary
          .map((s) => {
            return (
              '<div class="summary-card">' +
              '<div class="lbl">' + formatMonth(s.mes) + "</div>" +
              '<div class="val ' + mapeClass(s.mape) + '">' +
              fmtPct(s.mape) +
              "</div>" +
              '<div class="sub">MAPE · ' +
              s.skusComReal + "/" + (s.skus || 0) +
              " SKUs com real · " +
              fmtPct(s.pctDentroTolerancia) +
              " dentro da tolerância</div>" +
              "</div>"
            );
          })
          .join("");

        el.innerHTML = globalCards + monthCards;
        el.style.display = "flex";
      }

      // ---- Persistência local ----
      const BACKTEST_LS_KEY = "ut_backtest_v1";
      function saveBacktestToStorage() {
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(
            BACKTEST_LS_KEY,
            JSON.stringify({
              data: backtestData,
              summary: backtestSummary,
              savedAt: Date.now(),
            }),
          );
        } catch (e) {
          /* quota / disabled */
        }
      }
      function loadBacktestFromStorage() {
        try {
          const raw = localStorage.getItem(BACKTEST_LS_KEY);
          if (!raw) return false;
          const obj = JSON.parse(raw);
          if (!obj || !Array.isArray(obj.data) || !Array.isArray(obj.summary))
            return false;
          backtestData = obj.data;
          backtestSummary = obj.summary;
          backtestSavedAt = obj.savedAt || null;
          return true;
        } catch (e) {
          return false;
        }
      }
      function clearBacktestStorage() {
        try {
          localStorage.removeItem(BACKTEST_LS_KEY);
        } catch (e) {}
      }
      let backtestSavedAt = null;
      let backtestIsRunning = false;

      function renderBacktestResultsHeader(opts) {
        const cached = !!(opts && opts.cached);
        const header = els.backtestResultsHeader;
        const meta = els.backtestResultsMeta;
        if (!backtestData.length) {
          header.style.display = "none";
          els.clearBacktestBtn.style.display = "none";
          return;
        }
        const months = backtestSummary.length;
        meta.innerHTML =
          "<strong>" +
          backtestData.length +
          "</strong> linhas · <strong>" +
          months +
          "</strong> mês(es) analisado(s)" +
          (cached && backtestSavedAt
            ? '<span class="cached">salvo localmente</span>'
            : "");
        header.style.display = "flex";
        els.clearBacktestBtn.style.display = backtestIsRunning
          ? "none"
          : "inline-flex";
      }

      function renderBacktestAll(opts) {
        renderBacktestSummary();
        renderBacktest();
        renderBacktestResultsHeader(opts);
        els.backtestHelp.style.display = backtestData.length ? "" : "none";
      }

      // ---- Loading state ----
      function setBacktestLoading(on, info) {
        backtestIsRunning = !!on;
        els.backtestLoading.style.display = on ? "" : "none";
        els.runBacktestBtn.disabled = !!on;
        els.clearBacktestBtn.disabled = !!on;
        if (on) {
          els.runBacktestBtn.innerHTML =
            '<span class="btn-spinner"></span> Executando...';
          els.clearBacktestBtn.style.display = "none";
        } else {
          els.runBacktestBtn.innerHTML =
            '<span class="material-icons" style="font-size:18px">play_arrow</span> Rodar backtest';
        }
        if (on && info) updateBacktestProgress(info);
      }
      function updateBacktestProgress(info) {
        if (!info) return;
        if (info.title) els.backtestLoadingTitle.textContent = info.title;
        if (info.sub) els.backtestLoadingSub.textContent = info.sub;
        const pct =
          info.total && info.total > 0
            ? Math.min(100, Math.round((info.done / info.total) * 100))
            : 0;
        els.backtestProgressBar.style.width = pct + "%";
        els.backtestProgressLabel.textContent =
          (info.done || 0) + " de " + (info.total || "?") + " SKUs";
        els.backtestProgressPct.textContent = pct + "%";
      }

      function renderBacktestErrors(errors) {
        const el = els.backtestErrors;
        if (!errors || !errors.length) {
          el.style.display = "none";
          el.innerHTML = "";
          return;
        }
        el.innerHTML =
          '<div class="err-title"><span class="material-icons" style="font-size:18px">error_outline</span>' +
          " Falhas durante o backtest (" +
          errors.length +
          ")</div><ul>" +
          errors.map((e) => "<li>" + e + "</li>").join("") +
          "</ul>";
        el.style.display = "";
      }

      // Tamanho do chunk de SKUs por requisição.
      // Mantém cada execução do n8n curta para não estourar o task-runner.
      // Sobrescrito pela resposta de phase='start'.
      let BACKTEST_SKU_CHUNK = 30;
      const BACKTEST_INTER_CHUNK_DELAY_MS = 400;

      async function startBacktestSession(attempt) {
        const r = await fetch(API_BACKTEST, {
          method: "POST",
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          body: JSON.stringify({ phase: "start" }),
        });
        const text = await r.text();
        if (!r.ok) {
          if ((r.status === 524 || r.status === 522 || r.status === 502) && (attempt || 0) < 1) {
            await new Promise((res) => setTimeout(res, 4000));
            return startBacktestSession((attempt || 0) + 1);
          }
          throw new Error(
            "HTTP " + r.status + (text ? " \u2014 " + text.slice(0, 200) : ""),
          );
        }
        if (!text || !text.trim()) {
          throw new Error(
            "Resposta vazia em phase=start (workflow 'Universo-Backtest v2' inativo? Path /webhook/Backtest correto?)",
          );
        }
        let json;
        try { json = JSON.parse(text); }
        catch (pe) { throw new Error("JSON inválido em phase=start: " + text.slice(0, 200)); }
        if (typeof json.chunkSize === "number" && json.chunkSize > 0) {
          BACKTEST_SKU_CHUNK = json.chunkSize;
        }
        return json;
      }

      async function runBacktestChunk(month, offset, limit, attempt) {
        const r = await fetch(API_BACKTEST, {
          method: "POST",
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            phase: "chunk",
            targetMonths: [month],
            skuOffset: offset,
            skuLimit: limit,
          }),
        });
        const text = await r.text();
        if (!r.ok) {
          if ((r.status === 524 || r.status === 522 || r.status === 502) && (attempt || 0) < 1) {
            await new Promise((res) => setTimeout(res, 4000));
            return runBacktestChunk(month, offset, limit, (attempt || 0) + 1);
          }
          throw new Error(
            "HTTP " + r.status + (text ? " \u2014 " + text.slice(0, 200) : ""),
          );
        }
        if (!text || !text.trim()) {
          throw new Error(
            "Resposta vazia (workflow 'Universo-Backtest' inativo? URL /webhook/Backtest correta?)",
          );
        }
        let json;
        try { json = JSON.parse(text); }
        catch (pe) { throw new Error("JSON inválido: " + text.slice(0, 200)); }
        return {
          data: Array.isArray(json.data) ? json.data : [],
          summary: Array.isArray(json.summary) ? json.summary : [],
          totalSkus: typeof json.totalSkus === "number" ? json.totalSkus : 0,
          processedSkus: typeof json.processedSkus === "number" ? json.processedSkus : 0,
          nextOffset: typeof json.nextOffset === "number" ? json.nextOffset : (offset + limit),
          hasMore: !!json.hasMore,
        };
      }

      // ---- Persistência de progresso (resumível após reload) ----
      const BACKTEST_PROGRESS_KEY = "ut_backtest_progress_v1";
      function _btSaveProgress(s) {
        try { localStorage.setItem(BACKTEST_PROGRESS_KEY, JSON.stringify(s)); } catch (e) {}
      }
      function _btLoadProgress() {
        try { const r = localStorage.getItem(BACKTEST_PROGRESS_KEY); return r ? JSON.parse(r) : null; } catch (e) { return null; }
      }
      function _btClearProgress() {
        try { localStorage.removeItem(BACKTEST_PROGRESS_KEY); } catch (e) {}
      }
      function _btDefaultAcc() {
        return { n: 0, mapeSum: 0, hits: 0, withinTol: 0,
          wapeNum: 0, wapeDen: 0,
          realSum: 0, prevSum: 0 };
      }
      function _btUpdateAcc(acc, row) {
        acc.n += 1;
        if (row.errorPct != null) {
          acc.mapeSum += row.errorPct;
          acc.hits += 1;
          if (row.dentroDaTolerancia) acc.withinTol += 1;
          acc.wapeNum += row.errorAbs || 0;
          acc.wapeDen += Math.abs(row.real);
          acc.realSum += row.real;
          acc.prevSum += row.previsto;
        }
      }
      function _btBuildSummary(month, acc) {
        return {
          mes: month, skus: acc.n, skusComReal: acc.hits,
          mape: acc.hits ? parseFloat((acc.mapeSum / acc.hits).toFixed(2)) : null,
          wape: acc.wapeDen > 0 ? parseFloat(((acc.wapeNum / acc.wapeDen) * 100).toFixed(2)) : null,
          pctDentroTolerancia: acc.hits ? parseFloat(((acc.withinTol / acc.hits) * 100).toFixed(2)) : null,
          realTotal: parseFloat(acc.realSum.toFixed(3)),
          prevTotal: parseFloat(acc.prevSum.toFixed(3)),
        };
      }

      // Roda 1 mês por vez, em chunks de SKUs, agregando no front.
      // `initial` permite retomar a partir de um snapshot persistido.
      async function runBacktestForMonth(month, onProgress, initial) {
        let offset = (initial && typeof initial.offset === "number") ? initial.offset : 0;
        let totalSkus = (initial && initial.totalSkus) || 0;
        const monthData = (initial && Array.isArray(initial.data)) ? initial.data.slice() : [];
        const acc = (initial && initial.acc)
          ? Object.assign(_btDefaultAcc(), initial.acc)
          : _btDefaultAcc();

        while (true) {
          const res = await runBacktestChunk(month, offset, BACKTEST_SKU_CHUNK);
          if (res.totalSkus) totalSkus = res.totalSkus;
          for (const row of res.data) {
            monthData.push(row);
            _btUpdateAcc(acc, row);
          }
          offset = res.nextOffset;
          if (onProgress) onProgress({ month, offset, totalSkus, data: monthData, acc });
          if (!res.hasMore || res.processedSkus === 0) break;
          if (BACKTEST_INTER_CHUNK_DELAY_MS > 0) {
            await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, BACKTEST_INTER_CHUNK_DELAY_MS));
          }
        }

        return { data: monthData, summary: _btBuildSummary(month, acc), totalSkus };
      }

      // Núcleo de execução (usado tanto por nova run quanto por retomada).
      // `state` precisa conter: selected, currentIndex, current, doneData,
      // doneSummary, errors, startedAt. É persistido a cada chunk em
      // localStorage para sobreviver a reload da página.
      async function executeBacktest(state) {
        const resuming = !!(state.current || state.currentIndex > 0);

        // Resultados acumulados de meses já concluídos (caso de retomada)
        backtestData = state.doneData.slice();
        backtestSummary = Object.values(state.doneSummary).sort((a, b) =>
          a.mes.localeCompare(b.mes),
        );
        els.backtestStatus.className = "";
        els.backtestStatus.textContent = "";
        renderBacktestErrors(state.errors);
        renderBacktestAll();

        setBacktestLoading(true, {
          title: resuming ? "Retomando processamento..." : "Preparando planilha...",
          sub: "Baixando histórico para o cache",
          done: 0,
          total: 0,
        });

        // Sessão: garante que o cache Redis esteja válido (TTL 1h).
        try {
          await startBacktestSession();
        } catch (e) {
          setBacktestLoading(false);
          els.backtestStatus.className = "is-error";
          els.backtestStatus.textContent =
            "Falha ao iniciar sessão: " + (e.message || "erro");
          return;
        }

        _btSaveProgress(state);

        const monthTotals = {};
        const monthDone = {};
        for (const m of Object.keys(state.doneSummary)) {
          const s = state.doneSummary[m];
          monthTotals[m] = s.skus; monthDone[m] = s.skus;
        }
        if (state.current) {
          if (state.current.totalSkus) monthTotals[state.current.month] = state.current.totalSkus;
          monthDone[state.current.month] = state.current.offset || 0;
        }
        function totalDone() {
          return Object.values(monthDone).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
        }
        function totalExpected() {
          const known = Object.values(monthTotals).filter((v) => v > 0);
          const avg = known.length ? Math.max.apply(null, known) : 0;
          let t = 0;
          state.selected.forEach((m) => {
            t += monthTotals[m] != null ? monthTotals[m] : avg;
          });
          return t;
        }

        while (state.currentIndex < state.selected.length) {
          const i = state.currentIndex;
          const month = state.selected[i];
          const initial = state.current && state.current.month === month ? state.current : null;
          state.current = initial || { month, offset: 0, totalSkus: 0, data: [], acc: _btDefaultAcc() };
          _btSaveProgress(state);

          updateBacktestProgress({
            title: "Mês " + (i + 1) + " de " + state.selected.length + " — " + formatMonth(month),
            sub: "Processando SKUs...",
            done: totalDone(), total: totalExpected(),
          });

          try {
            const res = await runBacktestForMonth(month, (p) => {
              if (p.totalSkus) monthTotals[month] = p.totalSkus;
              monthDone[month] = p.offset;
              state.current.offset = p.offset;
              state.current.totalSkus = p.totalSkus;
              state.current.data = p.data;
              state.current.acc = p.acc;
              _btSaveProgress(state);
              updateBacktestProgress({
                title: "Mês " + (i + 1) + " de " + state.selected.length + " — " + formatMonth(month),
                sub: p.offset + " / " + (p.totalSkus || "?") + " SKUs deste mês",
                done: totalDone(), total: totalExpected(),
              });
              backtestData = state.doneData.concat(p.data);
              renderBacktest();
            }, initial);

            monthTotals[month] = res.totalSkus || res.data.length;
            monthDone[month] = res.totalSkus || res.data.length;
            state.doneData = state.doneData.concat(res.data);
            state.doneSummary[month] = res.summary;
            state.current = null;
            state.currentIndex = i + 1;
            _btSaveProgress(state);

            backtestData = state.doneData.slice();
            backtestSummary = Object.values(state.doneSummary).sort((a, b) =>
              a.mes.localeCompare(b.mes),
            );
            renderBacktestAll();
          } catch (e) {
            console.error("Backtest error (" + month + "):", e);
            state.errors.push(formatMonth(month) + ": " + (e.message || "erro"));
            state.current = null;
            state.currentIndex = i + 1;
            _btSaveProgress(state);
            renderBacktestErrors(state.errors);
          }
        }

        setBacktestLoading(false);
        backtestData = state.doneData.slice();
        backtestSummary = Object.values(state.doneSummary).sort((a, b) =>
          a.mes.localeCompare(b.mes),
        );
        backtestSavedAt = Date.now();
        if (backtestData.length) saveBacktestToStorage();
        _btClearProgress();
        renderBacktestAll();
        renderBacktestErrors(state.errors);

        if (state.errors.length && backtestData.length === 0) {
          els.backtestStatus.className = "is-error";
          els.backtestStatus.textContent =
            "Falha em todos os meses. Veja detalhes abaixo.";
        } else if (state.errors.length) {
          els.backtestStatus.className = "is-error";
          els.backtestStatus.textContent =
            "Concluído com falhas — " + backtestData.length +
            " linhas em " + (state.selected.length - state.errors.length) +
            "/" + state.selected.length + " meses.";
        } else {
          els.backtestStatus.className = "is-success";
          els.backtestStatus.textContent =
            "Concluído com sucesso — " + backtestData.length +
            " linhas em " + state.selected.length + " mês(es).";
        }
      }

      els.runBacktestBtn.addEventListener("click", async () => {
        if (backtestIsRunning) return;
        const selected = Array.from(backtestSelectedMonths).sort().reverse();
        if (!selected.length) {
          els.backtestStatus.className = "is-error";
          els.backtestStatus.textContent = "Selecione pelo menos um mês.";
          return;
        }
        // Substitui resultados anteriores
        backtestData = [];
        backtestSummary = [];
        renderBacktestErrors([]);
        renderBacktestAll();
        await executeBacktest({
          selected,
          currentIndex: 0,
          current: null,
          doneData: [],
          doneSummary: {},
          errors: [],
          startedAt: Date.now(),
        });
      });

      // Aviso ao tentar fechar/recarregar enquanto está processando.
      window.addEventListener("beforeunload", (e) => {
        if (backtestIsRunning) {
          e.preventDefault();
          e.returnValue = "";
        }
      });

      els.clearBacktestBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (backtestIsRunning) return;
        if (!confirm("Remover os resultados salvos do backtest?")) return;
        backtestData = [];
        backtestSummary = [];
        backtestSavedAt = null;
        clearBacktestStorage();
        renderBacktestErrors([]);
        els.backtestStatus.className = "";
        els.backtestStatus.textContent = "";
        renderBacktestAll();
      });

      els.backtestSearch.addEventListener("input", renderBacktest);

      // ---- Exportar CSV do backtest ----
      // Uma linha por SKU × mês, sep=';', decimal '.', UTF-8 BOM (abre certo no Excel).
      function exportBacktestCsv() {
        if (!backtestData.length) {
          alert("Sem resultados de backtest para exportar. Rode o backtest primeiro.");
          return;
        }
        const esc = (v) => {
          if (v == null) return "";
          const s = String(v);
          return /[;"\n\r]/.test(s) ? '"' + s.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"' : s;
        };
        const header = [
          "SKU", "Descricao", "Formato", "mes",
          "previsto", "real", "errorPct", "tolerancePct", "dentroDaTolerancia",
          "insufficientHistory", "tipo", "motivo",
          "selector", "wRecent", "biasFactor", "overshootRate",
          "capApplied", "fenceApplied", "hardCapApplied",
          "regimeDirection", "regimePullWeight",
          "predV1", "predV2Full", "looErrV1", "looErrV2",
          "empSamples", "recentSamples", "wRecentSamples",
        ];
        const lines = [header.join(";")];
        for (const r of backtestData) {
          const d = r.damping || {};
          const rs = d.regimeShift || {};
          lines.push([
            esc(r.SKU),
            esc(r["Descrição"]),
            esc(r.Formato),
            esc(r.mes),
            r.previsto != null ? r.previsto : "",
            r.real != null ? r.real : "",
            r.errorPct != null ? r.errorPct : "",
            r.tolerancePct != null ? r.tolerancePct : "",
            r.dentroDaTolerancia != null ? (r.dentroDaTolerancia ? 1 : 0) : "",
            r.insufficientHistory ? 1 : 0,
            esc(r.tipo),
            esc(r.motivo),
            esc(d.selector),
            d.wRecent != null ? d.wRecent : "",
            d.biasFactor != null ? d.biasFactor : "",
            d.overshootRate != null ? d.overshootRate : "",
            d.capApplied || d.wasCapped ? 1 : 0,
            d.fenceApplied ? 1 : 0,
            d.hardCapApplied ? 1 : 0,
            esc(rs.direction),
            rs.pullWeight != null ? rs.pullWeight : "",
            d.predV1 != null ? d.predV1 : "",
            d.predV2Full != null ? d.predV2Full : "",
            d.looErrV1 != null ? d.looErrV1 : "",
            d.looErrV2 != null ? d.looErrV2 : "",
            d.empSamples != null ? d.empSamples : "",
            d.recentSamples != null ? d.recentSamples : "",
            d.wRecentSamples != null ? d.wRecentSamples : "",
          ].join(";"));
        }
        const csv = "\uFEFF" + lines.join("\r\n");
        const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: "text/csv;charset=utf-8" });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement("a");
        const d2 = new Date();
        const stamp =
          d2.getFullYear() +
          "-" + String(d2.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0") +
          "-" + String(d2.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
        a.href = url;
        a.download = "backteste-" + stamp + ".csv";
        document.body.appendChild(a);
        a.click();
        a.remove();
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      }
      (function attachExportBacktestCsv() {
        const btn = document.getElementById("exportBacktestCsvBtn");
        if (btn) btn.addEventListener("click", exportBacktestCsv);
      })();

      // Restaura resultados salvos (se houver) ao carregar
      if (loadBacktestFromStorage()) {
        renderBacktestAll({ cached: true });
      }

      // Detecta processamento interrompido (reload/fechamento durante run).
      // Mostra banner inline com botões "Retomar" / "Descartar".
      (function checkInterruptedBacktest() {
        const prog = _btLoadProgress();
        if (!prog || !Array.isArray(prog.selected)) return;
        const totalMonths = prog.selected.length;
        const doneMonths = Math.max(0, prog.currentIndex || 0);
        if (doneMonths >= totalMonths && !prog.current) {
          _btClearProgress();
          return;
        }
        const partial = prog.current
          ? " (em " + formatMonth(prog.current.month) +
            ", " + (prog.current.offset || 0) +
            (prog.current.totalSkus ? "/" + prog.current.totalSkus : "") + " SKUs)"
          : "";
        els.backtestStatus.className = "";
        els.backtestStatus.innerHTML =
          '<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">' +
          '<span>Backtest interrompido — ' + doneMonths + '/' + totalMonths +
          ' meses concluídos' + partial + '.</span>' +
          '<button id="btResumeBtn" class="add-btn" style="padding:4px 10px;">Retomar</button>' +
          '<button id="btDiscardProgressBtn" class="add-btn" style="padding:4px 10px;background:#eee;color:#333;">Descartar</button>' +
          '</span>';
        const resumeBtn = document.getElementById("btResumeBtn");
        const discardBtn = document.getElementById("btDiscardProgressBtn");
        if (resumeBtn) resumeBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
          // Restaura seleção visual
          backtestSelectedMonths.clear();
          prog.selected.forEach((m) => backtestSelectedMonths.add(m));
          if (typeof renderBacktestMonthGrid === "function") renderBacktestMonthGrid();
          els.backtestStatus.textContent = "";
          executeBacktest(prog);
        });
        if (discardBtn) discardBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
          _btClearProgress();
          els.backtestStatus.textContent = "";
          els.backtestStatus.className = "";
        });
      })();

      // ============================================
      // APP START
      // ============================================
      async function startApp() {
        if (appStarted) return;
        appStarted = true;
        await loadAndRender();
      }

      checkAuth();
      document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
        lucide.createIcons();
      });
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
